definition: Part of or similar to rhetoric, the use of language as a means to persuade.
example: A rhetorical question is one used merely to make a point, with no response expected.
exampleZh: 反問句僅用於表達觀點，不期望得到答覆。

definition: To force (open) with a lever; to pry.
example: They were unable to prise open the box because it was too rusty.
exampleZh: 他們無法撬開盒子，因為它太生鏽了。

definition: Given to unplanned and silly ideas or actions.
example: My boss accused me of being flighty, so I immediately quit.
exampleZh: 老闆指責我輕浮，所以我立刻辭職了。

definition: The sulfur of Hell; Hell, damnation.
example: Medieval alchemists believed brimstone held purifying powers.
exampleZh: 中世紀的煉金術士相信硫磺具有淨化的能力。

definition: Perfect, without faults, flaws or errors
example: He grew up in Norway, but he writes impeccable English.
exampleZh: 他在挪威長大，但他的英文寫得無可挑剔。

definition: In a perfect or flawless manner.
example: Tom was impeccably dressed.
exampleZh: 湯姆穿著無可挑剔。

definition: To play about roughly, energetically or boisterously.
example: When the kids're allowed to romp in the bedroom, they break something.
exampleZh: 當孩子們被允許在臥室裡玩耍時，他們會打破一些東西。

definition: Someone who romps or frolics.
example: The lively toddler was a restless little romper who never sat still.
exampleZh: 這個活潑的小孩是個不安分的小連身褲，永遠不會安靜地坐著。

definition: Characterized by very precise, conscientious attention to details.
example: Tom and Mary are meticulous.
exampleZh: 湯姆和瑪麗很細心。

definition: In a meticulous manner.
example: Fyodor packed his gear meticulously.
exampleZh: 費奧多爾小心翼翼地收拾好他的裝備。

definition: To bring oneself into favour with someone by flattering or trying to please him or her.
example: Go over there, meet my grandparents, and ingratiate yourself.
exampleZh: 去那裡見見我的祖父母，然後討好自己。

definition: Which ingratiates; which attempts to bring oneself into the favour of another, often with flattery or insincerity.
example: That was an ingratiating smile.
exampleZh: 那是一種討好的微笑。

definition: To shine with a veiled, tremulous, or intermittent light; to gleam faintly.
example: The shimmer of the city lights was mesmerizing.
exampleZh: 城市燈光的閃爍令人著迷。

definition: To pick or take someone or something (from a larger group).
example: I breed betta fish and cull my unwanted stock by feeding them to my oscar.
exampleZh: 我飼養鬥魚，然後剔除不需要的魚群，將它們餵給我的奧斯卡。

definition: To swing or turn, as on a pin or pivot.
example: Bob ain't got no swivel.
exampleZh: 鮑勃沒有旋轉裝置。

definition: A container for arrows, crossbow bolts or darts, such as those fired from a bow, crossbow or blowgun.
example: He's got lots of sales pitches in his quiver.
exampleZh: 他的箭袋裡有很多推銷詞。

definition: Colored in patches; spotted
example: The mottled skin of the snake was a camouflage that helped it blend in with the shadows.
exampleZh: 蛇斑駁的皮膚是一種偽裝，有助於它融入陰影。

definition: A thermosetting polyepoxide resin used chiefly in strong adhesives, coatings and laminates; epoxy resin.
example: After bonding, more ductile epoxy is used to waterproof the bond.
exampleZh: 黏合後，使用更具延展性的環氧樹脂來防水黏合。

definition: Relating or pertaining to an angle or angles.
example: an angular figure
exampleZh: 有角的圖形

definition: To make damp or moist; to make slightly wet.
example: Benedito used water to dampen the cloth for cleaning.
exampleZh: 貝內迪托用水沾濕布清潔。

definition: To engage in piracy against any but one's own nation's ships.
example: Life as a buccaneer wasn't as fascinating as he thought. It was too bloody, so Mario decided to drop it and go back home.
exampleZh: 海盜的生活並不像他想像的那麼令人著迷。這太血腥了，所以馬裡奧決定放棄它並回家。

definition: A cluster of heterogeneous things.
example: conglomerate flowers
exampleZh: 聚合花

definition: A small, low island largely made of sand or coral.
example: We spent the afternoon snorkeling around the tiny cay, surrounded by crystal-clear waters and colorful fish.
exampleZh: 我們整個下午都在這個小珊瑚礁周圍浮潛，周圍環繞著清澈的海水和色彩繽紛的魚。

definition: To burn slightly.
example: Be careful not to singe your hair when you light the candles.
exampleZh: 點燃蠟燭時要小心，不要燒焦頭髮。

definition: A ribbon normally worn diagonally across the chest as a decoration or insignia of rank etc.
example: Several people tried to break through the cordon.
exampleZh: 有幾個人試圖衝破警戒線。

definition: The outer covering of a fruit or seed.
example: The ship hull is divided into watertight compartments.
exampleZh: 船體分為水密艙室。

definition: Of or relating to hell, or the world of the dead; hellish.
example: No one has crossed that infernal desert in hundreds of years.
exampleZh: 數百年來沒有人穿越過那片地獄般的沙漠。

definition: Of, or pertaining to, presentations.
example: The team focused on the presentational side, polishing every slide.
exampleZh: 團隊專注於簡報方面，完善每張投影片。

definition: To lay as in a bed; to lay in surrounding matter; to bed.
example: to embed something in clay, mortar, or sand
exampleZh: 將某物嵌入黏土、砂漿或沙中

definition: A feather of a bird, especially a large or showy one used as a decoration.
example: There was a plume of smoke coming from the shack.
exampleZh: 棚屋裡冒出一股濃煙。

definition: The chance or random quality of an event or circumstance.
example: by happenstance
exampleZh: 偶然

definition: To restore a friendly relationship; to bring back to harmony.
example: to reconcile people who have quarrelled
exampleZh: 使爭吵的人和解

definition: The reestablishment of friendly relations; conciliation or rapprochement.
example: He longed for reconciliation with his estranged father, but too many painful memories kept him from making contact again.
exampleZh: 他渴望與疏遠的父親和解，但太多痛苦的回憶讓他無法再次聯繫。

definition: Willing to conciliate, or to make concessions.
example: He was still mad about the accident despite his wife's conciliatory words.
exampleZh: 儘管妻子說了安撫的話，他仍然對這次事故感到憤怒。

definition: The process of bringing peace and harmony; the ending of strife.
example: The conciliation effort resulted in a mutually acceptable solution.
exampleZh: 調解努力達成了雙方都能接受的解決方案。

definition: An opinion formed before obtaining adequate evidence, especially as the result of bias or prejudice.
example: This will challenge any preconception you may have of modern art.
exampleZh: 這會挑戰你對現代藝術可能抱有的任何先入之見。

definition: Ornate, intricate, decorated, laden with detail.
example: She prefers quiet music - the baroque, for example.
exampleZh: 她更喜歡安靜的音樂——例如巴洛克音樂。

definition: To flash or gleam briefly.
example: She was a fine tall woman, black and quick and fierce, with a proud way of carrying her head, and a glint from her eye like a spark from a flint.
exampleZh: 她是個高挑的漂亮女人，皮膚黝黑，敏捷而兇猛，驕傲地昂著頭，眼睛閃爍著火石的火花。

definition: The stalk or stem of a plant.
example: The spire of the church rose high above the town.
exampleZh: 教堂的尖塔高高聳立在城鎮之上。

definition: Of, pertaining to, or characteristic of elephants.
example: He crossed the room with slow, elephantine steps.
exampleZh: 他以緩慢而巨大的步伐穿過房間。

definition: The capacity, condition, or state of acting or of exerting power.
example: individual agency
exampleZh: 個體代理機構

definition: To forgive, excuse or overlook (something that is considered morally wrong, offensive, or generally disliked).
example: Mennad cannot condone this marriage.
exampleZh: 門納德不能容忍這樁婚姻。

definition: A risky or daring undertaking or journey.
example: I'll venture a guess.
exampleZh: 我大膽猜測一下。

definition: Not noticeable or blatant; inconspicuous.
example: On her head, she wore an unobtrusive microphone that matched her skin color.
exampleZh: 她頭上戴著一個與她膚色相配的不顯眼的麥克風。

definition: Anything movable (a good) that is bought and sold.
example: The commodity exchange attracts foreign investors.
exampleZh: 商品交易所吸引了外國投資者。

definition: In a haunting manner.
example: The violin played a hauntingly beautiful melody.
exampleZh: 小提琴奏出了優美動聽的旋律。

definition: The sea; ocean; water; flood.
example: She filled the glass right up to the brim.
exampleZh: 她把杯子倒滿了。

definition: To expose to chance; to take a risk.
example: I'll hazard a guess.
exampleZh: 我大膽猜測一下。

definition: The quality of being genuine or not corrupted from the original.
example: I hereby certify the authenticity of this copy.
exampleZh: 本人特此證明本副本的真實性。

definition: Relating to the part of mental functions that deals with logic, as opposed to affective which deals with emotions.
example: Introverted thinking is my dominant cognitive function.
exampleZh: 內向思維是我的主要認知功能。

definition: An object made or shaped by human hand or labor.
example: The spot on his lung turned out to be an artifact of the X-ray process.
exampleZh: 他肺上的斑點原來是X光過程的偽像。

definition: A feeling of apprehension, doubt, fear etc.
example: He did not have any qualm of conscience.
exampleZh: 他沒有任何良心不安。

definition: Dwelling or raised in, or as if in, cloisters; solitary.
example: The architect cloistered the college just like the monastery which founded it.
exampleZh: 建築師像創建它的修道院一樣將學院隱居。

definition: An addition, an extension.
example: Netanyahu wants to annex the West Bank.
exampleZh: 內塔尼亞胡希望吞併約旦河西岸。

definition: To restore consciousness, vigor, or life to.
example: to resuscitate a drowned person; to resuscitate withered plants
exampleZh: 使溺者甦醒； to resuscitate withered plants

definition: The act of resuscitating.
example: CPR stands for cardiopulmonary resuscitation.
exampleZh: CPR代表心肺復甦術。

definition: To form into a whole by uniting its parts; to construct; to build.
example: to fabricate a bridge or ship
exampleZh: 製造橋樑或船隻

definition: The act of fabricating, framing, or constructing; construction; manufacture
example: the fabrication of a bridge, a church, or a government
exampleZh: 建造橋樑、教堂或政府

definition: Full of, or covered with, patches; abounding in patches.
example: patchy clouds
exampleZh: 斑片雲

definition: Having a deep, rich sound; mellow and resonant.
example: We had a resounding win against the rival team.
exampleZh: 我們對對手隊取得了一場徹底的勝利。

definition: With a loud, resonant sound.
example: The bells tolled resoundingly.
exampleZh: 鐘聲響亮地響起。

definition: A covered walk with an open colonnade on one side, running along the walls of buildings that face a quadrangle; especially:
example: What's the difference between a cloister and a church?
exampleZh: 迴廊和教會有什麼差別？

definition: To prearrange unalterably.
example: The bishop's role includes the power to select, ordain, and supervise ministers.
exampleZh: 主教的職責包括選擇、任命和監督牧師的權力。

definition: Recently started but not fully formed yet; just begun; only elementary or immature.
example: This definition is inchoate, and thus it must be interpreted.
exampleZh: 這個定義還很不成熟，因此必須對其進行解釋。

definition: Extremely happy and excited; delighted; pleased, euphoric.
example: She was elated with her new car.
exampleZh: 她對她的新車很滿意。

definition: An exhilarating psychological state of pride and optimism.
example: Yanni doesn't share Skura's elation.
exampleZh: 雅尼並不像斯庫拉那樣興高采烈。

definition: A condition where the patient has neurological symptoms such as numbness, blindness, paralysis, or fits, but without any neurological explanation.
example: Tom doesn't know the difference between passion and hysteria.
exampleZh: 湯姆不知道激情和歇斯底里之間的區別。

definition: Of, or arising from hysteria.
example: Tom became hysterical.
exampleZh: 湯姆變得歇斯底里。

definition: A funeral pile; a combustible heap on which corpses are burned.
example: The pyre burns the dead, but anxiety burns the living.
exampleZh: 柴堆焚燒死者，但焦慮焚燒生者。

definition: Showing contempt; expressing disdain; showing a lack of respect.
example: I don't know that guy, but he just gave me a contemptuous look.
exampleZh: 我不認識那個人，但他只是輕蔑地看了我一眼。

definition: In a disrespectful or discourteous manner; condescendingly.
example: He argued with the judge contemptuously, showing no respect or remorse for his actions.
exampleZh: 他輕蔑地與法官爭論，對自己的行為沒有表現出尊重或悔恨。

definition: Abandoned, deserted, left behind.
example: She and her uncle were sad and forlorn in their neglect and disgrace.
exampleZh: 她和她的叔叔因自己的忽視和恥辱而感到悲傷和孤獨。

definition: To criticise harshly; to reprove.
example: O Lord, do not rebuke me in Your anger or discipline me in Your wrath. (Psalm 6, BSB)
exampleZh: 主啊，求祢不要在怒中責備我，也不要在怒中管教我。 （詩篇 6，BSB）

definition: Inconsistent with, or far removed from, something; strongly opposed
example: abhorrent thoughts
exampleZh: 可憎的想法

definition: To regard with horror or detestation; to shrink back with shuddering from; to feel excessive repugnance toward; to detest to extremity; to loathe.
example: I absolutely abhor being stuck in traffic jams
exampleZh: 我絕對討厭塞車

definition: The act of wandering; deviation from truth, moral rectitude; abnormal; divergence from the straight, correct, proper, normal, or from the natural state.
example: aberration of character
exampleZh: 性格畸變

definition: A substance that helps an emulsion form, or helps keep an emulsion from separating.
example: The lecithin in egg yolks is often used as an emulsifier.
exampleZh: 蛋黃中的卵磷脂常被用作乳化劑。

definition: A substance added to another substance or product to produce specific properties in the combined substance.
example: Oil may be used as an additive in gasoline to improve the lubrication of a small engine.
exampleZh: 油可用作汽油添加劑，以改善小型引擎的潤滑。

definition: To walk, move or stand unsteadily or falteringly; threatening to fall.
example: I wish I were a kid again so I could play on a teeter-totter.
exampleZh: 我希望我能回到小時候，這樣我就可以玩蹺蹺板了。

definition: Having self-contradictory properties.
example: Many paradoxes are paradoxical only because they sound strange.
exampleZh: 許多悖論之所以顯得悖論，只是因為它們聽起來很奇怪。

definition: In a paradoxical manner; so as to create a paradox.
example: Paradoxically, he is right.
exampleZh: 矛盾的是，他是對的。

definition: An inflammation of the larynx, typically resulting in hoarseness.
example: Skillful listening is the best remedy for loneliness, loquaciousness, and laryngitis.
exampleZh: 熟練的傾聽是治療孤獨、多嘴、喉炎的最佳良藥。

definition: Strict; binding strongly; making strict requirements; restrictive; rigid; severe
example: They have stringent quality requirements outlining what is acceptable.
exampleZh: 他們有嚴格的品質要求，概述了可接受的範圍。

definition: A substance which draws tissue together, thus restricting the flow of blood.
example: These grapes are fairly astringent, so they make my mouth pucker.
exampleZh: 這些葡萄相當澀，所以它們讓我的嘴皺起來。

definition: (heading) To position or be positioned physically.
example: standing ovation
exampleZh: 起立鼓掌

definition: The primary income-earner in a household.
example: Yanni is the essential breadwinner in the family.
exampleZh: 雅尼是家裡重要的經濟支柱。

definition: Natural ability to acquire knowledge or skill.
example: I finally passed the aptitude test for higher management studies.
exampleZh: 我終於通過了高階管理研究的能力測試。

definition: Coming or characterized by torrents; flowing heavily or in large quantities.
example: There was a torrential downpour and we were all soaked.
exampleZh: 一場傾盆大雨，我們都濕透了。

definition: (heading) To send someone away and forbid that person from returning.
example: banish fear, qualm.
exampleZh: 消除恐懼、疑慮。

definition: The act of banishing.
example: The judge pronounced banishment upon the war criminal.
exampleZh: 法官宣布驅逐這名戰犯。

definition: A readiness in performance; aptness at doing something.
example: Their knack for discord is quite impressive.
exampleZh: 他們製造不和的本領令人印象深刻。

definition: The fulfillment of something worked for.
example: After six years of hard work, the engineers had brought the project to fruition.
exampleZh: 經過六年的努力，工程師們使這個計畫取得了成果。

definition: A large and violent whirlpool.
example: The maelstrom of passions is not what we need now.
exampleZh: 激情的漩渦不是我們現在所需要的。

definition: A whirlwind, whirlpool, or similarly moving matter in the form of a spiral or column.
example: 2004: the consumer vortex that is East Hampton — The New Yorker, 30 August 2004, p.38
exampleZh: 2004 年：東漢普頓的消費者漩渦 — 《紐約客》，2004 年 8 月 30 日，第 38 頁

definition: To make a false show or pretence of; to counterfeit or simulate.
example: I will feign indifference.
exampleZh: 我會假裝冷漠。

definition: A roll of paper or parchment; a writing formed into a roll.
example: I ordered a glass of lemonade and a coffee scroll.
exampleZh: 我點了一杯檸檬水和一份咖啡捲。

definition: A sandbank or sandbar creating a shallow.
example: If there is a shoal or a stone under water again, it should indicate them on the map.
exampleZh: 若水下又出現淺灘或石頭，應在地圖上標示。

definition: A building; a structure; an architectural fabric, especially a large and spectacular one
example: Marriage is an edifice that has to be rebuilt every day.
exampleZh: 婚姻是一座大廈，每天都需要重建。

definition: A dense, but generally small, growth of shrubs, bushes or small trees; a copse.
example: He had to complete a thicket of paperwork before he was allowed to join the company.
exampleZh: 在獲準加入公司之前，他必須完成一大堆文書工作。

definition: To add a leavening agent.
example: Seven days there shall not be found any leaven in your houses: he that shall eat leavened bread, his soul shall perish out of the assembly of Israel, whether he be a stranger or born in the land.
exampleZh: 你們家中七日不得有酵；凡吃有酵的餅，無論是外人，是本地生的，他的命必從以色列會中滅亡。

definition: To impact directly, especially if violent.
example: Two worlds collide.
exampleZh: 兩個世界碰撞。

definition: The character or fundamental values of a person, people, culture, or movement.
example: Settling down and raising a family was against the ethos of the times.
exampleZh: 安定下來並建立家庭是違背時代的精神。

definition: To combine through weaving.
example: Tom's works interweave science fiction and fantasy elements.
exampleZh: 湯姆的作品交織著科幻和奇幻元素。

definition: Not discreet; lacking in discretion.
example: "That is an indiscrete question." - "There are no indiscrete questions, only indiscrete answers."
exampleZh: “這是一個不明確的問題。” - “沒有不明確的問題，只有不明確的答案。”

definition: The quality or state of being indiscreet; lack of discretion
example: Your frivolity and indiscretion in choosing friends, Tom, can greatly hurt you in life.
exampleZh: 湯姆，你在選擇朋友時的輕率和輕率會為你的生活帶來極大的傷害。

definition: Pertaining to, or carried out by means of, a telescope.
example: telescopic stars
exampleZh: 望遠鏡星

definition: Lacking a definite form or clear shape.
example: The enormous pile of spaghetti landed on the floor in an amorphous heap.
exampleZh: 一大堆義大利麵落在地板上，形成了無定形的一堆。

definition: Something that deters.
example: That would act as a deterrent, don't you think?
exampleZh: 這會起到威懾作用，你不覺得嗎？

definition: The quality of being selective; usually the extent to which something is selective.
example: The university is famous for the selectivity of its admissions process.
exampleZh: 該大學以其招生過程的選擇性而聞名。

definition: Given to troublemaking.
example: A fractious child is a troublesome thing to deal with, but a fractious man is far worse.
exampleZh: 一個脾氣暴躁的孩子是一件很麻煩的事情，但一個脾氣暴躁的男人更糟。

definition: An aura of heightened interest, meaning or mystery surrounding a person or thing.
example: Westerners opine that there are magic and mystique in sinograms.
exampleZh: 西方人認為正弦圖具有魔力和神秘性。

definition: That buds, grows or expands; developing.
example: Back in the 1970s, Matoub was already a burgeoning start.
exampleZh: 早在 1970 年代，Matoub 就已經是一個蓬勃發展的開始。

definition: The act of assimilating or the state of being assimilated.
example: Mountain and desert Berbers resisted assimilation.
exampleZh: 山區和沙漠的柏柏爾人抵制同化。

definition: To put into a hamper.
example: Large patches of fog continued to hamper visibility for motorists.
exampleZh: 大片大霧持續阻礙駕駛者的能見度。

definition: (of a document) Corresponding with the original word for word.
example: Date unknown: Joint Committee on Printing Congress of the United States, General Statement of Procedure for Verbatim Reporting of Proceedings in Senate Chamber, page five:
exampleZh: 日期未知：美國國會印刷聯合委員會，參議院會議記錄逐字報告程序的一般聲明，第五頁：

definition: Truly; doubtlessly; honestly; in truth.
example: I verily believe that your convictions are false.
exampleZh: 我堅信你的信念是錯的。

definition: True; genuine.
example: He is a veritable genius.
exampleZh: 他是個名副其實的天才。

definition: The property of seeming true, of resembling reality; resemblance to reality, realism.
example: It is interesting how this conspiracy theory author abandons all attempts at verisimilitude.
exampleZh: 有趣的是，這位陰謀論作者如何放棄所有真實性的嘗試。

definition: A crafty but underhanded deception.
example: The language of truth must be, with no doubt, simple and without artifice.
exampleZh: 毫無疑問，真理的語言必須簡單、不做作。

definition: Infeasible: not feasible.
example: This plan is not just unfeasible, but impossible.
exampleZh: 這個計劃不僅不可行，而且不可能。

definition: A command, bidding; sometimes also, an authoritative request; now usually in the phrase at the behest of.
example: He testified that the wire-tapping was carried out at the behest of his superiors.
exampleZh: 他作證說，竊聽是在他的上級的要求下進行的。

definition: An expert in virtù or art objects and antiquities; a connoisseur.
example: Mary is a virtuoso flautist.
exampleZh: 瑪麗是一位演奏家長笛演奏家。

definition: The technical skills and fluent style of a virtuoso.
example: This pianist is known for his virtuosity.
exampleZh: 這位鋼琴家以其精湛的技藝而聞名。

definition: That cripples or incapacitates
example: crippling depression
exampleZh: 嚴重的憂鬱症

definition: Emerging; just coming into existence.
example: The nascent VR industry is still having trouble breaking into the mainstream.
exampleZh: 新興的 VR 產業在打入主流方面仍然遇到困難。

definition: A superficial or shallow knowledge of a subject.
example: She knows a smattering of Greek, but not enough to carry on a conversation.
exampleZh: 她懂一點希臘語，但還不足以進行對話。

definition: A collection of writings, often on a specific topic, of a specific genre, from a specific demographic or a particular author, etc.
example: I regularly contribute to the Berber corpus.
exampleZh: 我定期為柏柏爾語料庫做出貢獻。

definition: To breathe hard, and with an audible piping or whistling sound, as persons affected with asthma.
example: The new comedy is a wheeze.
exampleZh: 這部新喜劇令人喘氣。

definition: A beginner; a person who is new to a subject, skill, or belief.
example: I was still a neophyte in Congress and eagerly followed his leadership in this fight.
exampleZh: 我還是國會的新手，熱切地追隨他在這場鬥爭中的領導。

definition: To incorporate nutrients into the body, especially after digestion.
example: The US attempted to assimilate Native Americans.
exampleZh: 美國試圖同化美洲原住民。

definition: To raise; to lift; to elevate (especially, to raise or lift to a desired elevation, by means of tackle or pulley, said of a sail, a flag, a heavy package or weight).
example: Give me a hoist over that wall.
exampleZh: 給我一台起重機翻過那堵牆。

definition: Any of several Old World birds of prey of the genus Buteo with broad wings and a broad tail.
example: Can you tell the difference between a buzzard and a kite?
exampleZh: 你能分辨禿鷹和風箏嗎？

definition: Counterfeit or fake; not genuine.
example: bogus laws
exampleZh: 虛假法律

definition: Act of treating with disdain.
example: There are quite a few ways to express derision in Esperanto.
exampleZh: 世界語中有很多表達嘲笑的方式。

definition: Expressing or characterized by derision; mocking; ridiculing.
example: The critic's review of the film was derisive.
exampleZh: 影評人對這部電影的評論是嘲諷的。

definition: To fondle, kid, pet, tease.
example: Anna cautiously tried to coax the grasshopper toward the open window.
exampleZh: 安娜小心翼翼地試圖將蚱蜢引向開著的窗戶。

definition: A self-evident or obvious truth.
example: To say that technology changes rapidly is to utter a truism.
exampleZh: 說科技日新月異是不言而喻的。

definition: Uneasy with desire; itching; especially, having a lascivious anxiety or propensity; lustful.
example: Much to my dismay, Mary came to the party wearing a prurient dress.
exampleZh: 令我非常沮喪的是，瑪莉穿著一件淫蕩的衣服來參加派對。

definition: To shrivel, droop or dry up, especially from lack of water.
example: Lettuce leaves wither easily.
exampleZh: 生菜葉子很容易枯萎。

definition: Easily annoyed or irritated; peevish, testy or irascible.
example: But she soon grew weary of that occupation; she became careless in her reports, impatient and tetchy when reprimanded for her negligence.
exampleZh: 但她很快就厭倦了這份職業。她在報告中變得粗心大意，當因疏忽而受到斥責時，她變得不耐煩，脾氣暴躁。

definition: Having the faculty of quick motion in the limbs; apt or ready to move
example: an agile creature
exampleZh: 敏捷的生物

definition: The quality of being agile; the power of moving the limbs quickly and easily; quickness of motion
example: His superior agility countered his lack of strength.
exampleZh: 他卓越的敏捷彌補了力量的不足。

definition: Terrified; struck with amazement; showing signs of terror or horror.
example: I was aghast when the incident unfolded in front of me.
exampleZh: 當這件事發生在我面前時，我感到震驚。

definition: The condition of being a dwarf.
example: The condition, a form of dwarfism, affects the growth of the long bones.
exampleZh: 這種情況是侏儒症的一種，會影響長骨的生長。

definition: To look with the eyes partly closed, as in bright sunlight, or as a threatening expression.
example: He has a squint.
exampleZh: 他有斜視。

definition: Extreme pleasure, happiness or excitement.
example: Tom believes that the rapture is going to happen any day now.
exampleZh: 湯姆相信被提隨時都會發生。

definition: Full of rapture.
example: the rapturous emotions on the pulpit
exampleZh: 講台上的狂喜情緒

definition: To improvise all or part of a speech or other performance, especially in comedy.
example: He forgot part of his speech and had to ad-lib for a while.
exampleZh: 他忘了部分演講內容，不得不即興發揮一段時間。

definition: The art of producing an image from a metal plate into which an image or text has been etched with acid.
example: The Crayon Etching technique is like revealing a rainbow from gloom.
exampleZh: 蠟筆蝕刻技術就像從陰暗中露出彩虹。

definition: Needing or using up much energy; testing powers of endurance.
example: The movement towards a peaceful settlement has been a long and arduous political struggle.
exampleZh: 爭取和平解決的運動是一場長期而艱苦的政治鬥爭。

definition: More of a hindrance than a help.
example: Punching those who hold beliefs you oppose is counterproductive.
exampleZh: 打擊那些持有你反對的信念的人會適得其反。

definition: Of, resembling, or expressed as a proverb, cliché, fable, or fairy tale.
example: proverbial spilled milk
exampleZh: 俗話說“打翻的牛奶”

definition: Occurring, arising, or functioning without any delay; happening within an imperceptibly brief period of time.
example: He knew it was so, with an unaccountable but instantaneous certainty.
exampleZh: 他知道事情就是這樣，帶著一種無法解釋但瞬間的確定性。

definition: Without any delay; in an instantaneous manner.
example: If a thermonuclear bomb hit that base, we'd be vaporized instantaneously.
exampleZh: 如果熱核炸彈擊中那個基地，我們就會立即蒸發。

definition: To chew cud. (Said of ruminants.) Involves regurgitating partially digested food from the rumen.
example: A camel will ruminate just as a cow will.
exampleZh: 駱駝會像牛一樣反芻。

definition: Chewing cud.
example: Cattle are ruminant animals.
exampleZh: 牛是反芻動物。

definition: A missionary, or leader of a religious mission, especially one in the early Christian Church (but see Apostle).
example: The apostle Paul was born in Tarsus.
exampleZh: 使徒保羅出生在大數。

definition: A fatty layer of adipose tissue found immediately beneath the epidermis.
example: Atuqtuaq helps his mother take the blubber from the seal carcass.
exampleZh: 阿圖克圖阿克幫助他的母親從海豹屍體上取出鯨脂。

definition: An English dessert made from a mixture of thick custard, fruit, sponge cake, jelly and whipped cream.
example: You must not trifle with her affections.
exampleZh: 你絕不能玩弄她的感情。

definition: Supreme; highest; chief.
example: Getting those credit cards paid off is paramount.
exampleZh: 還清這些信用卡是至關重要的。

definition: To twist one's body with snakelike motions.
example: The prisoner managed to squirm out of the straitjacket.
exampleZh: 囚犯設法從束縛衣中掙脫出來。

definition: A low, flat mass of floating ice.
example: A polar bear drifted past on a small ice floe.
exampleZh: 一隻北極熊在一塊小浮冰上漂過。

definition: To represent in a physical or concrete form; to incarnate or personify.
example: As the car salesman approached, wearing a plaid suit and slicked-back hair, he seemed to embody sleaze.
exampleZh: 當汽車推銷員穿著格子西裝和光滑的頭髮走近時，他似乎體現了卑鄙。

definition: The process of embodying.
example: You are the very embodiment of beauty.
exampleZh: 你就是美麗的化身。

definition: Full of longing or yearning.
example: His eyes grew wistful as he recalled his university days.
exampleZh: 回憶起大學時光，他的眼神變得充滿渴望。

definition: In a wistful manner.
example: Tom gazes wistfully over the rooftops to where his lover lives.
exampleZh: 湯姆渴望地凝視著屋頂上他愛人居住的地方。

definition: Concerned with the exchange of goods for profit.
example: To what extent was Igor wrong calling her "mercantile"?
exampleZh: 伊戈爾稱她為「商人」在多大程度上是錯的？

definition: To survive on a minimum of resources.
example: Giraffes subsist mainly on acacia leaves.
exampleZh: 長頸鹿主要以金合歡葉為食。

definition: Real being; existence.
example: the subsistence of qualities in bodies
exampleZh: 身體素質的存在

definition: To form or shape in an oblique way; to cause to take an oblique position.
example: Despite Republican propaganda to the contrary, people making under $50,000 per year still skew overwhelmingly Democratic.
exampleZh: 儘管共和黨的宣傳與此相反，年收入低於 5 萬美元的人仍然絕大多數傾向民主黨。

definition: The major unit or division of the Roman army, usually comprising 3000 to 6000 infantry soldiers and 100 to 200 cavalry troops.
example: Russia’s labor and capital resources are woefully inadequate to overcome the state’s needs and vulnerabilities, which are legion.
exampleZh: 俄羅斯的勞動力和資本資源嚴重不足以克服國家的巨大需求和脆弱性。

definition: Pertaining to a confrontation; characterized by, or given to initiating hostile encounter; in-your-face.
example: Are you confrontational?
exampleZh: 你有對抗性嗎？

definition: A period of something, usually painful or unpleasant.
example: a bout of drought.
exampleZh: 一陣乾旱

definition: An extremely painful inflammation of joints, especially of the big toe, caused by a metabolic defect resulting in the accumulation of uric acid in the blood and the deposition of urates around the joints.
example: Drink wine and get gout, or drink no wine and get gout anyway.
exampleZh: 喝酒就會得痛風，或是不喝酒也會得痛風。

definition: Financial support or assistance, such as a grant.
example: My financial situation is supported by a state subsidy.
exampleZh: 我的經濟狀況是靠國家補貼支撐的。

definition: Something which hinders: something that holds back or causes problems with something else.
example: High-heeled shoes may be fashionable, but they can also be a hindrance to walking.
exampleZh: 高跟鞋可能很時尚，但也可能成為行走的障礙。

definition: (modifying a singular noun) Multifaceted, having innumerable elements
example: Earth hosts myriad animals.
exampleZh: 地球上棲息著無數的動物。

definition: Of or relating to actors or acting.
example: No need to get all histrionic. You're not on a soap opera.
exampleZh: 沒必要裝腔作勢。你不是在演肥皂劇。

definition: The likelihood that something will sell; market appeal.
example: This is a beautiful house with high marketability.
exampleZh: 這是一棟漂亮的房子，具有很高的適銷性。

definition: Expressed in silence; implied, but not made explicit; silent.
example: tacit consent : consent by silence, or by not raising an objection
exampleZh: 預設同意：以沉默或不提出反對的方式表示同意

definition: In a tacit manner; done in silence or implied.
example: Your failure to object to the request resulted in you tacitly approving the change.
exampleZh: 您未能反對該請求導致您預設了更改。

definition: Silent; temperamentally untalkative; disinclined to speak.
example: The two sisters could hardly have been more different, one so boisterous and expressive, the other so taciturn and calm.
exampleZh: 兩姊妹截然不同，一個如此喧鬧而富有表現力，另一個則如此沉默寡言和冷靜。

definition: Stealthy, furtive, well hidden, covert (especially movements).
example: The surreptitious gesture went unnoticed by the rest of the room.
exampleZh: 這個偷偷摸摸的舉動沒有被房間裡的其他人注意到。

definition: In a surreptitious manner; stealthily, furtively, secretly.
example: He was seen surreptitiously eating a piece of cake.
exampleZh: 有人看到他偷偷地吃著一塊蛋糕。

definition: The representation of abstract principles by characters or figures.
example: As an allegory of war, chess is a game of attack and defense.
exampleZh: 作為戰爭寓言，國際象棋是一種進攻和防守的遊戲。

definition: Of, relating to, or containing allegory
example: Fifty years ago when these books were first written that was a much more allegorical message and now it's something that looks really cool.
exampleZh: 五十年前，當這些書第一次寫出來時，這是一個更具寓言性的信息，現在看起來真的很酷。

definition: Full of seeds.
example: Pomegranates are as seedy as any fruit you are likely to see.
exampleZh: 石榴和您可能看到的任何水果一樣多籽。

definition: Inflicting punishment, punishing
example: The jury awarded $10,000 in punitive damages.
exampleZh: 陪審團裁定給予 10,000 美元的懲罰性賠償。

definition: Medium.
example: The quiet suburban neighborhood provides the perfect milieu for raising a family.
exampleZh: 安靜的郊區為養家糊口提供了完美的環境。

definition: Pure; not mixed or adulterated with anything
example: The only thing flowing through Tom's veins was pure, unadulterated rage.
exampleZh: 湯姆的血管裡流淌的只有純粹的、不摻雜任何雜質的憤怒。

definition: To corrupt.
example: to adulterate food, drink, drugs, coins, etc.
exampleZh: 在食品、飲料、藥品、硬幣等中摻假

definition: Reasonable and convincing; based on evidence.
example: The prosecution presented a cogent argument, convincing the jury of the defendant's guilt.
exampleZh: 控方提出了令人信服的論據，使陪審團相信被告有罪。

definition: Not similar or congruent; not matching or fitting in.
example: 20 and 25 are incongruous with respect to 4.
exampleZh: 20 和 25 與 4 不一致。

definition: To make difficult to accomplish; to act as an obstacle; to frustrate.
example: Patronizing attitudes can hinder productive conversations.
exampleZh: 居高臨下的態度會阻礙有成效的對話。

definition: To render less lively; to diminish; to muffle.
example: to deaden a wall or a floor
exampleZh: 使牆壁或地板變得不活躍

definition: (grammar, of a word or phrase) Modifying a noun, while in the same phrase as that noun.
example: In "this big house", "big" is attributive, whereas in "this house is big", it is predicative.
exampleZh: 在「this big house」中，「big」是定語，而在「this house is big」中，「big」是表語。

definition: Responsible travel to natural areas supporting the fauna, flora, and local economy
example: Ecotourism serves the environment and improves the well-being of indigenous peoples, too.
exampleZh: 生態旅遊服務於環境，也改善了原住民的福祉。

definition: Resembling a farce; ludicrous; absurd.
example: He made a farcical attempt to save face during the fallout of his sex scandal.
exampleZh: 在性醜聞爆發期間，他做出了一場滑稽的挽回面子的嘗試。

definition: (of a musical instrument) Tuned to the correct pitch.
example: Ever since the beginning of COVID-19, I am more attuned to my environment.
exampleZh: 自從 COVID-19 爆發以來，我更加適應我的環境。

definition: In an initial stage; beginning, starting, coming into existence.
example: After 500 years, incipient towns appeared.
exampleZh: 500年後，出現了早期的城鎮。

definition: The use of echoes to detect objects as observed in bats and other natural creatures. Also known as biosonar.
example: The bat's echolocation allows it to navigate in the dark.
exampleZh: 蝙蝠的迴聲定位能力使其能夠在黑暗中導航。

definition: (audio effects) An electronic effect which simulates echoes or reverberations in the sound signal being processed.
example: I'd like a little less reverb on the lead singer's voice.
exampleZh: 我希望主唱聲音的殘響少一點。

definition: A violent oscillation or vibration.
example: The discomfort caused by the bat's reverberation surprised Tommy.
exampleZh: 蝙蝠的迴響所引起的不適讓湯米感到驚訝。

definition: To rush, flood, or increase suddenly.
example: We're witnessing a surge in Algerian nationalism.
exampleZh: 我們目睹了阿爾及利亞民族主義的高漲。

definition: Naive and trusting.
example: Mary is an ingenuous student.
exampleZh: 瑪莉是一位天真爛漫的學生。

definition: A manager or producer in the entertainment industry, especially music or theatre.
example: He's a well-known impresario.
exampleZh: 他是一位著名的經理人。

definition: The property by virtue of which a material deformed under load can regain its original dimensions when unloaded
example: If the sales of an item drop by 5% when the price increases by 10%, its price elasticity is -0.5.
exampleZh: 如果一種商品的價格上漲10%，銷量下降5%，則其價格彈性為-0.5。

definition: The formation of something complex or coherent by combining simpler things.
example: The molecule's complexity makes its synthesis almost impossible.
exampleZh: 這種分子的複雜性使它幾乎不可能合成。

definition: Relating to saliva.
example: The parasympathetic nerves of a developing salivary gland innervate the salivary gland epithelium which is essential for organogenesis.
exampleZh: 發育中的唾液腺的副交感神經支配唾液腺上皮，這對於器官發生至關重要。

definition: Treatment of disease by means of hypnotism.
example: Tom underwent hypnotherapy to help him give up smoking.
exampleZh: 湯姆接受了催眠療法來幫助他戒菸。

definition: Completely and entirely; to the fullest extent.
example: A creature wholly given to brawls and wine.
exampleZh: 一種完全沉迷於爭吵和酗酒的生物。

definition: (of a person) Feeling or filled with remorse.
example: He was so remorseful that he voluntarily paid full restitution.
exampleZh: 他非常懊悔，自願全額賠償。

definition: To object; to express disapproval (with, against).
example: I remonstrate with my boss about my performance evaluation.
exampleZh: 我就我的績效評估向老闆提出抗議。

definition: Not exceptional.
example: The meal was pleasant but ultimately unexceptional.
exampleZh: 這頓飯很愉快，但最終也不例外。

definition: Impossible to prevent or stop; inevitable.
example: Holmes sat in a great, old-fashioned chair, his inexorable eyes gleaming out of his haggard face.
exampleZh: 福爾摩斯坐在一張老式大椅子上，憔悴的臉上閃爍著冷酷的目光。

definition: In an inexorable manner; without the possibility of stopping or prevention.
example: We watched as the storm clouds advanced inexorably closer to us.
exampleZh: 我們看著暴風雲無情地逼近我們。

definition: To ring or sound with many echos.
example: The loud sounds of sawing, drilling and scraping reverberate around the room.
exampleZh: 鋸切、鑽孔和刮削的響亮聲音在房間裡迴盪。

definition: A fish of the order Abdominales.
example: abdominal cavity
exampleZh: 腹腔

definition: Something that one uses to achieve an objective, e.g. raw materials or personnel.
example: a man/woman of resource
exampleZh: 資源豐富的男人/女人

definition: A dollar.
example: Can you scoot over and make room for one more person?
exampleZh: 你能跑過去騰出地方再容納一個人嗎？

definition: The act or process of learning secret information through clandestine means.
example: Espionage reveals the unseen battles.
exampleZh: 間諜活動揭示了看不見的戰鬥。

definition: A machine for washing dishes.
example: Mennad ruined the dishwasher.
exampleZh: 門納德毀了洗碗機。

definition: A person who wrestles.
example: The wrestler bladed himself.
exampleZh: 摔角手用刀割傷了自己。

definition: An insane or very foolish person.
example: If you carry on like this, they'll send you to the loony bin.
exampleZh: 如果你再這樣下去，他們會把你送進瘋人院。

definition: A variety of a language that is characteristic of a particular area, community or social group, differing from other varieties of the same language in relatively minor ways as regards grammar, phonology, and lexicon.
example: What is that dialect?
exampleZh: 那是什麼方言？

definition: A very large and destructive wave, generally caused by a tremendous disturbance in the ocean, such as an undersea earthquake or volcanic eruption. Tsunami are usually a series of waves, or wave train.
example: The earthquake caused a tsunami.
exampleZh: 地震引發了海嘯。

definition: A professional who counsels people, especially on personal problems.
example: Tom asked his guidance counsellor how to apply to college.
exampleZh: 湯姆問他的輔導員如何申請大學。

definition: Not correct; erroneous or wrong.
example: He gave an incorrect answer to a simple question.
exampleZh: 他對一個簡單的問題給了錯誤的答案。

definition: A pendant that opens to reveal a space used for storing a photograph or other small item.
example: Mary put the silver locket around her neck.
exampleZh: 瑪麗把銀項鍊戴在脖子上。

definition: A magician or wizard, sometimes specifically male.
example: Donald saved Jessica from an evil sorcerer.
exampleZh: 唐納德從邪惡巫師手中救了潔西卡。

definition: An Italian savoury dish made with rice and other ingredients.
example: Do you like risotto?
exampleZh: 你喜歡義大利調味飯嗎？

definition: A product or commodity from agriculture.
example: An agricultural tool
exampleZh: 一種農業工具

definition: Not reliable.
example: Tom seemed unreliable.
exampleZh: 湯姆看起來不可靠。

definition: Pertaining to marriage.
example: Unregistered marital unions are illegal.
exampleZh: 未登記的婚姻關係是非法的。

definition: A condition of severe suffering due to a lack of nutrition.
example: The refugees are facing starvation.
exampleZh: 難民面臨飢餓。

definition: One of the simple machines; a piece of material, such as metal or wood, thick at one edge and tapered to a thin edge at the other for insertion in a narrow crevice, used for splitting, tightening, securing, or levering.
example: Stick a wedge under the door, will you? It keeps blowing shut.
exampleZh: 在門下面塞個楔子，可以嗎？它一直被風吹著關閉。

definition: The condition of being sane.
example: Ziri heard something that questioned his sanity.
exampleZh: 茲裡聽到了一些質疑他神智的事。

definition: A position at the side of one's bed.
example: Mary turned off her bedside lamp.
exampleZh: 瑪麗關掉了床頭燈。

definition: An assembly including one or more judges to conduct judicial business; a court of law.
example: The process of creating a “tribunal for Putin” has been launched.
exampleZh: 創建「普丁法庭」的進程已經啟動。

definition: To replace or enhance human labor with machines.
example: Companies prefer to use automated systems.
exampleZh: 公司更喜歡使用自動化系統。

definition: The tenth letter of the Greek alphabet.
example: At school I had enjoyed reading Japanese literature in English translation, in particular Soseki's I am a Cat and Kokoro, and Akutagawa's The Nose and Kappa.
exampleZh: 在學校時，我很喜歡閱讀英譯本的日本文學，特別是漱石的《我是貓》和《心》，以及芥川的《鼻子》和《河童》。

definition: One of various hostile supernatural creatures, now especially (fantasy literature) a malevolent and grotesque diminutive humanoid.
example: The goblin army will attack at midnight.
exampleZh: 半夜妖精大軍將發動攻擊。

definition: A disclosure.
example: Lukas refused to disclose that information.
exampleZh: 盧卡斯拒絕透露該訊息。

definition: In a polite manner
example: If pressed about a serious accusation like rape, you can politely reply that you can’t answer questions pertaining to such an allegation without legal representation and wish to remain silent. ― G.S. Luthra, New Jersey Beach Beat Down Shows Why It’s Foolish To Resist Police
exampleZh: 如果被追問強姦等嚴重指控，您可以禮貌地回答說，如果沒有法律代表，您無法回答與此類指控相關的問題，並且希望保持沉默。 ——G.S. Luthra，新澤西州海灘毆打事件顯示抵抗警察是愚蠢的

definition: Concerned with something else; distracted; giving one's attention elsewhere.
example: I was preoccupied with a deadline at work, and I forgot his birthday.
exampleZh: 我全神貫注於工作的最後期限，忘了他的生日。

definition: The area by and around the sea; including the beach, promenade or cliffs
example: Algeria has breathtaking seaside views.
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞擁有令人驚嘆的海濱景色。

definition: Having or showing grace in movement, shape, or proportion.
example: She is a graceful dancer.
exampleZh: 她是一位優雅的舞者。

definition: Any of a group of European plants, genus, Lavandula, of the mint family.
example: Nothing grew there besides wild lavender.
exampleZh: 那裡除了野生薰衣草外什麼也沒長。

definition: Something that simulates a system or environment in order to predict actual behaviour.
example: The most reliable simulation predicts that the hurricane will turn north.
exampleZh: 最可靠的模擬預測颶風將轉向北方。

definition: One who, or that which, stretches.
example: The stretcher was shoved into the ambulance.
exampleZh: 擔架被推進了救護車。

definition: Of, pertaining to, or having grooves.
example: The back of the tile was groovy so that it could hold the adhesive compound.
exampleZh: 磁磚的背面有凹槽，可以容納黏合劑。

definition: A wide bowl for washing, sometimes affixed to a wall
example: Yanni needs to replace this basin mixer.
exampleZh: 雅尼需要更換這款面盆龍頭。

definition: A formal meal served in the middle of the day.
example: I'm afraid I won't be able to make it for our luncheon appointment.
exampleZh: 恐怕我無法參加午餐約會了。

definition: (grammar) The masculine gender.
example: “John”, “Paul” and “Jake” are masculine names.
exampleZh: 「約翰」、「保羅」和「傑克」是男性名字。

definition: A stringed musical instrument (chordophone), usually with a round body, a membrane-like soundboard and a fretted neck, played by plucking or strumming the strings.
example: I come from Alabama with my banjo on my knee...
exampleZh: 我來自阿拉巴馬州，膝上放著我的班卓琴…

definition: One who or that which hops.
example: To catch a big fish, use a hopper that jumps across the pond surface.
exampleZh: 要捕獲大魚，請使用跳過池塘表面的漏斗。

definition: Constituting a sin; being morally or religiously wrong; wicked; evil
example: Man is sinful.
exampleZh: 人是有罪的。

definition: The creation of sound effects, and their addition to film and TV images
example: Many of the sounds heard in nature documentaries are created by foley artists.
exampleZh: 自然紀錄片中聽到的許多聲音都是由擬音藝術家創作的。

definition: A small flat case containing magnetic tape on two reels, used to record and play back audio and video material.
example: Damiano found a cassette tape.
exampleZh: 達米亞諾找到了一盤盒式磁帶。

definition: To separate items into different categories according to certain criteria that determine their sorts.
example: Algeria needs sorting facilities.
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞需要分類設施。

definition: To weaken, as a joint, ligament, or muscle, by sudden and excessive exertion, as by wrenching; to overstrain, or stretch injuriously, but without luxation
example: His lawyer managed to get Tom sprung from prison.
exampleZh: 他的律師設法讓湯姆出獄。

definition: Having lasted from a remote period; having been of long duration; of great age, very old.
example: Jonas believed that the prehistoric pictograms depicted aliens.
exampleZh: 喬納斯相信史前象形文字描繪的是外星人。

definition: An act of renouncing.
example: to renounce a title to land or to a throne
exampleZh: 放棄土地或王位的所有權

definition: The protracted, mournful cry of a dog or a wolf, or other like sound.
example: The jackal howls.
exampleZh: 豺狼嚎叫。

definition: The condition of being suspended; cessation for a time.
example: This story is full of suspense.
exampleZh: 這個故事充滿了懸念。

definition: In a random manner.
example: Balloons were randomly popping.
exampleZh: 氣球隨機爆裂。

definition: To strike in the face.
example: The children weren't interested in sitting still for a serious photo; they mugged for the camera.
exampleZh: 孩子們對安靜地坐著認真拍照不感興趣；他們喜歡安靜地坐著拍照。他們對著鏡頭搶劫。

definition: Having elegance or taste or refinement in manners or dress.
example: Black is classic and stylish.
exampleZh: 黑色經典又時尚。

definition: In vertebrates, including humans, a ductless vascular gland, located in the left upper abdomen near the stomach, which destroys old red blood cells, removes debris from the bloodstream, acts as a reservoir of blood, and produces lymphocytes.
example: This fellow is up to something. I can feel it in my spleen.
exampleZh: 這傢伙有事。我能在我的脾臟中感覺到它。

definition: A member of any of several Christian denominations which separated from the Roman Catholic Church based on theological or political differences during the Reformation (or sometimes later).
example: 1915 November 3, decision in the case of the State of New Mexico v. Garrett, published in 1916 among the Decisions of the Department of the Interior in Cases Relating to Public Lands, volume 44 (edited by George J Hesselman), page 490: In the case of Hyacinthe Villeneuve a homestead entry had been allowed upon a tract of land that had been patented to the Santa Fe Railroad Company, whose grantees had expressed a willingness to reconvey in order that effect might be given to the equities of the homesteader, whereas in the present case the State stands in the position of a protestant.
exampleZh: 1915 年 11 月 3 日，新墨西哥州訴加勒特案的判決，發表於 1916 年內政部關於公共土地案件的判決中，第 44 卷（喬治·J·赫塞爾曼編輯），第 490 頁：願意恢復，以便對自耕農的權益產生影響，而在本案中，國家站在新教徒的立場上。

definition: (chiefly in the plural) Something incidental to the main subject, but of less importance.
example: For circumstantial evidence, that's plenty.
exampleZh: 對於間接證據來說，這就夠了。

definition: The act of building or putting up or together of something.
example: The Empire State Building was once the world's tallest erection.
exampleZh: 帝國大廈曾經是世界上最高的建築物。

definition: A small room, closet, or cabinet usually located in or near the kitchen, dedicated to shelf-stable food storage and/or storing kitchenware, like a larder, but smaller.
example: Our pantry is completely empty.
exampleZh: 我們的食品儲藏室完全空了。

definition: The quality produced by the sensation of taste or, especially, of taste and smell in combined effect.
example: Its flavour is indescribable.
exampleZh: 其味道難以形容。

definition: Small fragments of rock, used for laying on the beds of roads and railways, and as ballast.
example: The gravel crunched under our feet.
exampleZh: 礫石在我們腳下嘎吱作響。

definition: A nocturnal omnivore native to North America, typically with a mixture of gray, brown, and black fur, a mask-like marking around the eyes and a striped tail; Procyon lotor.
example: The raccoon drinks water.
exampleZh: 浣熊喝水。

definition: To tie; to confine by any ligature.
example: Just to make the cheese more binding
exampleZh: 只是為了讓起司更有黏合力

definition: Not valid; not true, correct, acceptable or appropriate.
example: This invalid contract cannot be legally enforced.
exampleZh: 該無效契約不能合法執行。

definition: To supply with light.
example: Someone should enlighten Tom.
exampleZh: 應該有人啟發湯姆。

definition: To make a journey
example: The Rolling Stones were still touring when they were in their seventies.
exampleZh: 滾石樂團七十多歲時仍在巡迴演出。

definition: A particular edible plant, Spinacia oleracea, or its leaves.
example: Spinach is my kryptonite.
exampleZh: 菠菜是我的氪石。

definition: A book for keeping notes, especially one for keeping accounting records; a record book, a register.
example: The auditors will have a hard time deciphering this ledger.
exampleZh: 審計員將很難破解這個帳本。

definition: With little or no sound; free of disturbing noise.
example: Would you please talk quieter?
exampleZh: 請你小聲說話好嗎？

definition: Having qualities of splendor or royalty.
example: My signature is meaningful, majestic and inimitable.
exampleZh: 我的簽名意味深長、雄偉且無與倫比。

definition: A writer of history; a chronicler; an annalist.
example: Yanni is a historian.
exampleZh: 雅尼是一位歷史學家。

definition: A polypeptide hormone that regulates carbohydrate metabolism.
example: Apart from insulin, the pancreas also produces enzymes.
exampleZh: 除了胰島素之外，胰臟還會產生酵素。

definition: A person not adhering to a main world religion; a follower of a pantheistic or nature-worshipping religion.
example: Sami worshipped a pagan deity.
exampleZh: 薩米人崇拜異教神靈。

definition: To render fit, suitable, or correspondent; to adapt.
example: to accommodate ourselves to circumstances
exampleZh: 適應環境

definition: Extremely large or on a great scale.
example: A single puppy can make a colossal mess.
exampleZh: 一隻小狗就會造成巨大的混亂。

definition: A ruminant, of the genus Giraffa, of the African savannah with long legs and highly elongated neck, which make it the tallest living animal; yellow fur patterned with dark spots, often in the form of a network; and two or more short, skin-covered horns, so-called; strictly speaking the horn-like projections are ossicones.
example: Are you having a giraffe?!
exampleZh: 你養的是長頸鹿嗎？ ！

definition: One who swims.
example: Ziri is a swimmer.
exampleZh: 齊裡是一名游泳選手。

definition: A huge mass of ocean-floating ice which has broken off a glacier or ice shelf
example: The Titanic hit an iceberg and sank.
exampleZh: 泰坦尼克號撞上冰山並沉沒。

definition: To make (something) new again; to restore to freshness or original condition.
example: I'd like to renew these three books.  Did you know that you can renew online?
exampleZh: 我想續訂這三本書。  您知道可以在線上續訂嗎？

definition: A person who considers it their own responsibility to uphold the law in their neighborhood and often does so summarily and without legal jurisdiction.
example: A vigilante ghost is going around avenging his own brutal murder.
exampleZh: 一名治安維持者的鬼魂四處遊蕩，為自己的殘忍謀殺報仇。

definition: To crush with the teeth by repeated closing and opening of the jaws; done to food to soften it and break it down by the action of saliva before it is swallowed.
example: I chewed.
exampleZh: 我咀嚼著。

definition: A cellular phone (mobile phone).
example: I want a cellular phone, but I don't have enough money to pay for one.
exampleZh: 我想要一部手機，但我沒有足夠的錢來購買。

definition: A system of rules and principles for speaking and writing a language.
example: a grammar of geography
exampleZh: 地理學語法

definition: Offensive to good taste
example: Jessica dressed like an indecent woman.
exampleZh: 潔西卡穿得像個不雅女人。

definition: A cage for keeping rabbits, guinea pigs, etc.
example: The boy went into the rabbit hutch.
exampleZh: 男孩走進兔子籠。

definition: A wireless telecommunications device that receives text or voice messages.
example: Yanni turned his pager off.
exampleZh: 雅尼關掉了傳呼機。

definition: A fall, trip or substantial misstep.
example: I saw Tom stumble.
exampleZh: 我看到湯姆絆倒了。

definition: A message sent quickly, as a shipment, a prompt settlement of a business, or an important official message sent by a diplomat, or military officer.
example: Mary is a taxi dispatcher.
exampleZh: 瑪麗是一名計程車調度員。

definition: The remains of something that has been cut off; especially the remains of a tree, the remains of a limb.
example: The stump is completely rotten.
exampleZh: 樹樁完全腐爛了。

definition: Alligator.
example: The gator was coming straight at us.
exampleZh: 鱷魚徑直向我們襲來。

definition: Each by itself; for or to each one
example: These melons cost a dollar apiece.
exampleZh: 這些瓜每個一美元。

definition: Molten material, the product of melting.
example: He melts copper.
exampleZh: 他熔化銅。

definition: Lacking in force (usually strength) or ability.
example: The weakest are the measuring stick of justice.
exampleZh: 最弱的是正義的標尺。

definition: A stage performance, especially one by amateurs.
example: He spoke with great enthusiasm of the theatrical performance.
exampleZh: 他滿懷熱情地談到了戲劇表演。

definition: To recognize someone or something as different from others based on its characteristics.
example: Dogs can't distinguish colours.
exampleZh: 狗無法辨別顏色。

definition: In an unnecessary way; not by necessity.
example: He unnecessarily repeated much of what others had covered.
exampleZh: 他不必要地重複了其他人已經報道過的大部分內容。

definition: The northern section of a state.
example: They went hunting in upstate New York.
exampleZh: 他們去紐約州北部打獵。

definition: Striving; earnest endeavor; hard work.
example: They strive for continuous improvement.
exampleZh: 他們努力持續改進。

definition: The state of being accurate; being free from mistakes, this exemption arising from carefulness; exactness; correctness
example: The value of testimony depends on its accuracy.
exampleZh: 證言的價值取決於其準確性。

definition: A cosmopolitan, a cocktail containing vodka, triple sec, lime juice and cranberry juice.
example: I read this in Cosmo.
exampleZh: 我在《科斯莫》上讀到了這篇文章。

definition: The quality of having a bitter taste.
example: You exude bitterness.
exampleZh: 你散發著苦澀。

definition: An event undertaken to get money by voluntary contributions for a particular activity, such as equipment for extracurricular sports programs, or to defray laboratory costs (salaries) for research of a cure for a particular disease.
example: This year's fundraiser will be a walkathon.
exampleZh: 今年的募款活動將是一場步行馬拉松。

definition: Short for circular letter.
example: Your dictionary defines "brave" as "courageous", and "courageous" as "brave". That's a circular definition.
exampleZh: 你的字典將“勇敢”定義為“勇敢”，將“勇敢”定義為“勇敢”。這是一個循環定義。

definition: A person who is insolent.
example: You're fired, insolent fool.
exampleZh: 你被解雇了，無禮的傻瓜。

definition: One who travels, especially on a journey to visit sites of religious significance.
example: Yanni is a pilgrim from Algeria.
exampleZh: 雅尼是一位來自阿爾及利亞的朝聖者。

definition: One who handles something (especially manually) or someone.
example: The handler of a weapon gets a symbolic sensation of deadly power.
exampleZh: 武器的使用者會感受到致命力量的象徵性感覺。

definition: An act of purging.
example: Sami wanted to purge the evil spirit our of Layla's body.
exampleZh: 薩米想要清除蕾拉體內的邪靈。

definition: (with "the") Those who have been killed.
example: Our foes must all be slain.
exampleZh: 我們的敵人必須全部被消滅。

definition: Someone (especially one who is male) who is skilled in the work of fighting fire.
example: The firemen quickly extinguished the blaze.
exampleZh: 消防員很快就將火撲滅。

definition: A manual of herbs and their medical uses
example: Herbal tea has a nice aroma and is good for a stuffy head.
exampleZh: 花草茶香氣宜人，對緩解頭悶有好處。

definition: Young or seeming young.
example: a youthful butler
exampleZh: 年輕的管家

definition: In accordance with reason.
example: They were able handle their disagreements reasonably.
exampleZh: 他們能夠合理地處理分歧。

definition: A character having a lawful alignment.
example: Lawful money is always a land asset and can only be issued by an actual land jurisdiction government — not a corporation.
exampleZh: 合法貨幣始終是土地資產，只能由實際的土地管轄政府（而不是公司）發行。

definition: The principal current in a flow, such as a river or flow of air
example: His ideas were well outside the mainstream, but he presented them intelligently, and we were impressed if not convinced.
exampleZh: 他的想法遠遠超出了主流，但他巧妙地表達了這些想法，即使不令人信服，也給我們留下了深刻的印象。

definition: To cut trees into logs.
example: Tom logged off.
exampleZh: 湯姆註銷了。

definition: A court-mandated allowance made to a former spouse by a divorced or legally separated person.
example: Ziri is behind on rent because of alimony.
exampleZh: 齊裡因為贍養費而拖欠房租。

definition: A person's life.
example: Nils and Nelly walked across the mudflats to Langeoog.
exampleZh: 尼爾斯和耐莉穿過泥灘前往蘭格奧格。

definition: To rise; to get up; to appear from below the horizon.
example: The uprising failed to achieve its objectives.
exampleZh: 起義未能達到其目的。

definition: Live entertainment held in a restaurant or nightclub; the genre of music associated with this form of entertainment, especially in early 20th century Europe.
example: Tonight there is a performance of a known cabaret artist.
exampleZh: 今晚有一位著名歌舞表演藝術家的表演。

definition: The act of depriving a person of a weapon they carry.
example: to disarm a man's wrath
exampleZh: 消除男人的憤怒

definition: Of a kind likely to be damaging; injurious
example: Wear a hat to protect your skin from harmful sunlight.
exampleZh: 戴帽子以保護皮膚免受有害陽光的傷害。

definition: A large mass of stone detached from the surrounding land.
example: They climbed the boulder.
exampleZh: 他們爬上了巨石。

definition: The total number of all available workers; the workforce.
example: Adding manpower to a late software project makes it later.
exampleZh: 在已晚的軟體專案中加入人力會使專案變得更晚。

definition: (usually with on, upon, etc.) The back of a horse.
example: He rode horseback into town.
exampleZh: 他騎馬進城。

definition: In a thankful manner; giving thanks.
example: I was almost late for work, but thankfully there wasn't much traffic on the roads.
exampleZh: 我上班差點遲到，幸好路上交通不多。

definition: To give new life, energy or encouragement (to); to refresh, enliven.
example: I want to recreate my future.
exampleZh: 我想重新創造我的未來。

definition: A grouping of three.
example: Tom has the dark triad of personality traits.
exampleZh: 湯姆具有黑暗人格特質。

definition: A case for carrying papers, drawings, photographs, maps and other flat documents.
example: I would like to introduce you to our portfolio of services.
exampleZh: 我想向您介紹我們的服務組合。

definition: A form of film punctuation in which there is a gradual transition from one scene to the next
example: It won't dissolve.
exampleZh: 它不會溶解。

definition: A long loose outer garment, often signifying honorary stature.
example: Tom likes blue robes.
exampleZh: 湯姆喜歡藍色長袍。

definition: Belief that there are distinct human races with inherent differences which determine their abilities, and generally that some are superior and others inferior.
example: Martin Luther King spoke out against racism.
exampleZh: 馬丁·路德·金公開反對種族主義。

definition: A cat; a pussy.
example: O grey pussycat, please don't purr. Grandpa might hear you.
exampleZh: 哦，灰色的小貓咪，請不要發出咕嚕聲。爺爺可能會聽到你的聲音。

definition: A stupid person.
example: The blue-footed booby is well named for its distinctive blue feet.
exampleZh: 藍腳鰹鳥因其獨特的藍色腳而得名。

definition: Unwilling to spend, give, or share; ungenerous; mean
example: Women are stingy, right!
exampleZh: 女人都是小氣的吧！

definition: A sport involving the performance of sequences of movements requiring physical strength, flexibility, and kinesthetic awareness.
example: Gymnastics was a significant part of the physical education curriculum.
exampleZh: 體操是體育課程的重要組成部分。

definition: An emperor of a German-speaking country, particularly the Holy Roman Empire (962–1806), the Austrian Empire (1806–1918), or the German Empire (1871–1918) — often specifically Wilhelm II — or any emperor.
example: The kaiser paid tribute to the sultan to avoid being attacked.
exampleZh: 德皇向蘇丹致敬以避免受到攻擊。

definition: The act or process of (physically or figuratively) attaching.
example: I have such an attachment towards my fiancé!
exampleZh: 我對我的未婚夫有如此的執念！

definition: A building in which things are registered or where registers are kept.
example: In Germany, people can only get married at the registry office.
exampleZh: 在德國，人們只能在登記處結婚。

definition: A person who acts with valor, showing hero-like characteristics in the midst of danger.
example: Her appearance presented a valiant attempt at smartness.
exampleZh: 她的外表表現出對聰明的勇敢嘗試。

definition: The well-baked fat on the surface of a piece of roasted meat.
example: Baked rolls should be crispy.
exampleZh: 烤好的麵包捲應該是酥脆的。

definition: To cross from one side to another of (gender, sex or something in that vein).
example: My girlfriend is trans.
exampleZh: 我的女朋友是變性人。

definition: A diurnal predatory bird of the family Accipitridae, smaller than an eagle.
example: It is illegal to hunt hawks or other raptors in many parts of the world.
exampleZh: 在世界許多地方捕獵鷹或其他猛禽是非法的。

definition: That which persuades; incitement.
example: Mary was very persuasive.
exampleZh: 瑪麗很有說服力。

definition: An inadequate person.
example: Boris deemed Melissa unworthy of such a responsibility.
exampleZh: 鮑里斯認為梅莉莎不值得承擔這樣的責任。

definition: A traditional story which embodies a belief regarding some fact or phenomenon of experience, and in which often the forces of nature and of the soul are personified; a sacred narrative regarding a god, a hero, the origin of the world or of a people, etc.
example: Myth was the product of man's emotion and imagination, acted upon by his surroundings. (E. Clodd, Myths & Dreams (1885), 7, cited after OED)
exampleZh: 神話是人類情感和想像力的產物，受到周遭環境的影響。 (E. Clodd, Myths & Dreams (1885), 7, 引自《牛津英語字典》)

definition: The staircase and landing or porch leading to the entrance of a residence.
example: I'd never stoop that low.
exampleZh: 我永遠不會把自己降得那麼低。

definition: To feel overwhelming fear.
example: Stop panicking!
exampleZh: 別驚慌！

definition: A point source from which radiation is emitted.
example: the radiant sun
exampleZh: 燦爛的太陽

definition: A game played on a rectangular court between two teams of two to six players which involves striking a ball back and forth over a net.
example: Yesterday I played volleyball.
exampleZh: 昨天我打了排球。

definition: Totally reprehensible.
example: I hope they catch the person responsible for that heinous crime.
exampleZh: 我希望他們能抓住犯下這令人髮指罪行的人。

definition: A harmonic set of three or more notes that is heard as if sounding simultaneously.
example: This chord progression sounds jazzy.
exampleZh: 這個和弦進行聽起來很爵士。

definition: A game of chance, in which a small ball is made to move round rapidly on a circle divided off into numbered red and black spaces, the one on which it stops indicating the result of a variety of wagers permitted by the game.
example: to roulette a sheet of postage stamps
exampleZh: 輪盤一張郵票

definition: Pleasant, capable of giving pleasure.
example: That was an enjoyable day; I had a lot of fun.
exampleZh: 那是愉快的一天；我玩得很開心。

definition: The main part of the (human) body that extends from the neck to the groin, excluding the head and limbs.
example: Ziri noticed that one of the manikins had red spots on its torso.
exampleZh: 茲裡注意到其中一個人體模型的軀幹上有紅點。

definition: Easily giving way under pressure.
example: This towel feels a little bit softer.
exampleZh: 這條毛巾感覺更柔軟一些。

definition: An act of delegating.
example: One delegation followed another.
exampleZh: 一個代表團接著一個代表團。

definition: A long, pointed canine tooth used for biting and tearing flesh
example: The vampire smiled at Edmundo and revealed her fangs.
exampleZh: 吸血鬼對著艾德蒙多微笑並露出了她的獠牙。

definition: A small horse-drawn cart.
example: This software is so buggy that I don't know how anyone can use it!
exampleZh: 這個軟體bug太多了，不知道怎麼有人用！

definition: The womb, an organ of the female reproductive system in which the young are conceived and develop until birth.
example: How do you expect me to have children when I don't have a uterus?
exampleZh: 如果我沒有子宮，你怎麼指望我生孩子？

definition: Target sighted.
example: What you're saying now doesn't tally with what you said earlier.
exampleZh: 你現在說的和之前說的不符。

definition: Impure carbon obtained by destructive distillation of wood or other organic matter, that is to say, heating it in the absence of oxygen.
example: Charcoal, a substance similar to coal, is produced from wood.
exampleZh: 木炭是一種類似煤的物質，由木材製成。

definition: One who heals, especially through faith.
example: Boris took Melissa to a healer.
exampleZh: 鮑里斯帶梅麗莎去看治療師。

definition: A disguise or covering up.
example: Tom usually wears a camouflage jacket.
exampleZh: 湯姆通常穿著迷彩夾克。

definition: Quickly, very soon, promptly.
example: I need to finish this assignment pronto.
exampleZh: 我需要盡快完成這項作業。

definition: Someone (implied male) who delivers mail to, and/or collects mail from, residential or commercial addresses, or from public mailboxes
example: The mailman is between postboxes.
exampleZh: 郵差在郵箱之間。

definition: Anything edible.
example: edible fruit
exampleZh: 食用水果

definition: A false belief that is resistant to confrontation with actual facts.
example: It is far better to grasp the universe as it really is than to persist in delusion, however satisfying and reassuring.
exampleZh: 掌握宇宙的本來面目比堅持妄想要好得多，無論這有多令人滿意和令人安心。

definition: An animal character with human-like characteristics; most commonly refers to such characters created by members of the furry subculture.
example: Bumblebees are furry.
exampleZh: 大黃蜂是毛茸茸的。

definition: The area where something forks or branches, a ramification takes place.
example: There is a child sitting in a crotch of that tree.
exampleZh: 那棵樹的胯下坐著一個孩子。

definition: An enclosed windowed chair suitable for a single occupant, carried by at least two porters, in equal numbers in front and behind, using wooden rails that passed through metal brackets on the sides of the chair.
example: Tom's two-door sedan is surprisingly roomy.
exampleZh: 湯姆的兩門轎車出奇地寬敞。

definition: A distant view or prospect, especially one seen through some opening, avenue or passage.
example: a vista of pleasure to come
exampleZh: 即將到來的歡樂景象

definition: A regular polyhedron having six identical square faces.
example: Cut the apple into cubes.
exampleZh: 將蘋果切成方塊。

definition: An ultraroyalist in France.
example: an ultra reformer; ultra measures
exampleZh: 超級改革者；極端措施

definition: To control or keep in check.
example: Restrain your laughter.
exampleZh: 克制住你的笑聲。

definition: A little finger, the finger furthest on a hand from the thumb.
example: I licked cream cheese off my pinkie.
exampleZh: 我舔掉小指上的奶油乳酪。

definition: Rare; not readily found; unusual.
example: Bald eagles are an uncommon sighting in this state
exampleZh: 在這個州，禿鷹並不常見

definition: In a wide manner; across a wide area.
example: Opinions vary widely.
exampleZh: 意見分歧很大。

definition: Any undesirable substance or group of cells that has made its way into part of the body.
example: High-grade tumors often infiltrate surrounding structures.
exampleZh: 高級別腫瘤經常浸潤周圍結構。

definition: A second-year undergraduate student in a college or university, or a second-year student in a four-year secondary school or high school.
example: She was very mature for a sophomore and had several friends who were juniors or even seniors.
exampleZh: 作為一名大二學生，她已經很成熟了，並且有幾個大三甚至大四的朋友。

definition: A large medal, usually decorative.
example: What a beautiful medallion!
exampleZh: 多麼漂亮的獎章啊！

definition: To bewilder, perplex
example: Ali Wilder, you little vixen.
exampleZh: 阿里·懷爾德，你這個小潑婦。

definition: (law enforcement) An officer of the court, particularly:
example: The defendant handed his paperwork to the bailiff rather than directly to the judge.
exampleZh: 被告將其文件交給了法警，而不是直接交給了法官。

definition: To send or convey something from one person, place or thing to another.
example: a telegraphically transmitted message
exampleZh: 電報訊息

definition: A situation of serious and immediate danger.
example: Victory without peril is triumph without glory.
exampleZh: 沒有危險的勝利就是沒有榮耀的勝利。

definition: A party bringing a suit in civil law against a defendant; accusers.
example: The plaintiff lost his motion for sanctions.
exampleZh: 原告的製裁動議失敗了。

definition: A type of hat, once worn by women or children, held in place by ribbons tied under the chin.
example: The bonnet was cool to the touch.
exampleZh: 引擎蓋摸起來很涼。

definition: A distinctive member (Acinonyx jubatus) of the cat family, slightly smaller than the leopard, but with proportionately longer limbs and a smaller head. It is native to Africa and also credited with being the fastest terrestrial animal.
example: The Saharan cheetah is seriously endangered.
exampleZh: 撒哈拉獵豹已嚴重瀕臨絕種。

definition: Relatively great in extent from one surface to the opposite in its smallest solid dimension.
example: Condensed milk is thicker than normal milk.
exampleZh: 煉乳比一般牛奶濃稠。

definition: Agreement or concurrence of opinion, will, or action.
example: the accord of light and shade in painting
exampleZh: 繪畫中光影的配合

definition: A young bull.
example: They hate Sandra Bullock.
exampleZh: 他們討厭桑德拉布洛克。

definition: Acronym of Clip-on Load Adjusting Mechanism. A device that can be fitted onto an oar to adjust set.
example: Those sneakers cost me fifty clams!
exampleZh: 那雙運動鞋花了我五十蛤！

definition: A hand-held device consisting of a series of lenses and prisms, used to magnify objects so that they can be better seen from a distance, and looked at through both eyes.
example: Ziri grabbed his binoculars.
exampleZh: 齊裡抓起他的雙筒望遠鏡。

definition: The point of a pin.
example: The investigators tried to pinpoint the source of the flames.
exampleZh: 調查人員試圖查明火焰的來源。

definition: Problematic; open to doubt or challenge.
example: It is questionable if the universe is open or closed.
exampleZh: 宇宙是開放的還是封閉的是值得懷疑的。

definition: One who attends to the wishes of hotel guests.
example: Our concierge team will locate the resources to fulfill your needs.
exampleZh: 我們的禮賓團隊將找到資源來滿足您的需求。

definition: To use; enjoy; have the full employment of.
example: I will not brook any disobedience.   I will brook no refusal.   I will brook no impertinence.
exampleZh: 我不會容忍任何不服從的行為。   我不會容忍拒絕。   我不會容忍無禮的行為。

definition: Of, relating to, or concerning the body.
example: His bodily deficiencies were a heavy burden to him.
exampleZh: 身體上的缺陷對他來說是一個沉重的負擔。

definition: A future existence or state.
example: May Allah forgive his sins and elevate his rank in the hereafter.
exampleZh: 願安拉寬恕他的罪孽並提高他在來世的地位。

definition: Power or the use of power; sovereignty over something; stewardship, supremacy.
example: the dominions of a king  the dominion of the passions
exampleZh: 國王的統治  激情的統治

definition: A trancelike state, artificially induced, in which a person has a heightened suggestibility, and in which suppressed memories may be experienced.
example: The hypnotist said, "All hypnosis is self hypnosis."
exampleZh: 催眠師說：“一切催眠都是自我催眠。”

definition: Having an inclination to secrecy
example: He's secretive.
exampleZh: 他很神秘。

definition: Of, relating to, or belonging to a city, a citizen, or citizenship; municipal or civil.
example: Thousands of people came to the Civic Center to show off their civic pride.
exampleZh: 數千人來到市政中心展示他們的公民自豪感。

definition: State of being disabled; deprivation or want of ability; absence of competent physical, intellectual, or moral power, means, fitness, and the like.
example: Dyscalculia is math disability.
exampleZh: 計算障礙是數學障礙。

definition: Doubt; the condition of being uncertain or without conviction.
example: Every new chapter begins with uncertainty.
exampleZh: 每一個新的篇章都以不確定性開始。

definition: The chores of maintaining a house as a residence, especially cleaning.
example: The computer program does some general housekeeping involving initializing variables and opening files before beginning the main processing.
exampleZh: 電腦程式在開始主要處理之前執行一些常規內務處理，包括初始化變數和開啟檔案。

definition: A type of small, oily fish of the genus Clupea, often used as food.
example: He shoveled down the herring salad.
exampleZh: 他把鯡魚沙拉鏟下去。

definition: An imaginary or real place full of wonder or marvels.
example: Alice will tell you that in Wonderland everything is topsy-turvy.
exampleZh: 愛麗絲會告訴你，仙境裡的一切都是顛倒的。

definition: Any shrub of the genus Pieris (family Ericaceae), having leathery leaves and small flowers.
example: The Andromeda galaxy is the Milky Way’s biggest galactic neighbor.
exampleZh: 仙女座星係是銀河系最大的銀河系鄰居。

definition: Fired ceramic wares that contain clay when formed.
example: The shelves were lined with pottery of all shapes and sizes.
exampleZh: 架子上擺滿了各種形狀和大小的陶器。

definition: A prize or award.
example: There are many websites providing premium VR porn already.
exampleZh: 已經有許多網站提供優質 VR 色情內容。

definition: An anti-personnel artillery shell used in WWI which carries a large number of individual bullets close to the target and then ejects them to allow them to continue along the shell's trajectory and strike the target individually.
example: The dog ate my sandwich, and there was shrapnel all over the place from him tearing open the bag.
exampleZh: 那隻狗吃了我的三明治，他撕開袋子，到處都是彈片。

definition: One who plans.
example: Johnny is a good planner. He starts his work in time to get it finished by the deadline.
exampleZh: 約翰尼是一個很好的計劃者。他及時開始工作並在截止日期前完成。

definition: A plant, Brassica oleracea var. italica, of the cabbage family, Brassicaceae; especially, the tree-shaped flower and stalk that are eaten as a vegetable.
example: Are you cooking broccoli?
exampleZh: 你在煮西蘭花嗎？

definition: To raise using a jack.
example: He jacked the car up so that he could replace the brake pads.
exampleZh: 他把車頂起來，以便更換煞車片。

definition: Any member of the family Cactaceae, a family of flowering New World succulent plants suited to a hot, semi-desert climate.
example: Benedito's favorite plant is a cactus.
exampleZh: 貝內迪托最喜歡的植物是仙人掌。

definition: (manner) In a manner that one does not believe.
example: He gestured unbelievably. Everyone knew he was faking being sick.
exampleZh: 他做出難以置信的手勢。大家都知道他是裝病。

definition: Without pause.
example: The river continuously flows to the sea, it will never pause to let us cross on dry land.
exampleZh: 河流不斷地流向大海，它永遠不會停下來讓我們在陸地上渡過。

definition: The property of being fair or equitable.
example: Some questioned the fairness of the new laws.
exampleZh: 有些人質疑新法的公平性。

definition: The country of one's ancestors.
example: Mother and motherland are greater than heaven.
exampleZh: 母親和祖國比天堂更偉大。

definition: To feel sorry about (a thing that has or has not happened), afterthink: to wish that a thing had not happened, that something else had happened instead.
example: He regretted his words.
exampleZh: 他對自己的話感到後悔。

definition: The systematic recitation of an event or series of events.
example: The plot is full of holes, but the narrative is extremely compelling.
exampleZh: 劇情漏洞百出，但敘事卻極為引人入勝。

definition: The ruler of an absolute monarchy or the head of state of a constitutional monarchy.
example: Monarch butterflies are disappearing.
exampleZh: 帝王蝶正在消失。

definition: To connect, secure or tie with a bond; to bind.
example: The gargantuan ape was bonded in iron chains and carted onto the stage.
exampleZh: 巨猿被綁在鐵鍊上，被推上舞台。

definition: Someone or something that catches.
example: It happens that we have two copies of Catcher in the Rye.
exampleZh: 剛好我們有兩本《麥田裡的守望者》。

definition: Intended to impress others; ostentatious.
example: Her dress was obviously more pretentious than comfortable.
exampleZh: 她的穿著顯然比舒適更做作。

definition: A type of government where absolute sovereignty is allotted to an individual or a small clique.
example: Myanmar is a military dictatorship.
exampleZh: 緬甸是一個軍事獨裁國家。

definition: A point; the sharp end or top of anything that terminates in a point; as, the peak, or front, of a cap.
example: The fog covered the peaks.
exampleZh: 霧氣籠罩了山峰。

definition: Torn or worn; unkempt.
example: They lived in a tiny apartment, with some old, shabby furniture.
exampleZh: 他們住在一間小公寓裡，裡面有一些破舊的家具。

definition: To put in jeopardy, to threaten.
example: We can't let anything jeopardize our mission tomorrow.
exampleZh: 我們不能讓任何事情危害我們明天的使命。

definition: To esteem too highly; to give greater praise than due.
example: My sister is an overrated singer.
exampleZh: 我姐姐是一位被高估的歌手。

definition: Bristling, rough, rugged.
example: The other girls in class are always horrid to Jane.
exampleZh: 班上的其他女孩總是讓簡感到害怕。

definition: To do too much; to exceed what is proper or true in doing; to carry too far.
example: Don't overdo it!
exampleZh: 不要太過分了！

definition: The act of thinking again about something.
example: This business plan of yours looks risky. It needs a rethink.
exampleZh: 你的這個商業計劃看起來有風險。它需要重新思考。

definition: To open (something) again.
example: The shops have to reopen.
exampleZh: 商店必須重新開業。

definition: A long-drawn, high-pitched complaining cry or sound
example: Don't whine.
exampleZh: 別發牢騷。

definition: Not forgivable; inexcusable.
example: The denigration is unforgivable.
exampleZh: 這種誹謗是不可原諒的。

definition: The act of rewinding.
example: I meant to pause the picture, but hit the rewind by mistake.
exampleZh: 本來想暫停畫面，卻誤按了倒帶鍵。

definition: Flawed or damaged; unsound, liable to break apart; ramshackle.
example: What's the craziest thing you've done this year?
exampleZh: 今年你做過最瘋狂的事是什麼？

definition: A short act or piece between others, as in a play; a break between acts.
example: Interact with other people.
exampleZh: 與其他人互動。

definition: A variety of red wine from this region.
example: Like most white Burgundy wine, it is made entirely from the Chardonnay grape.
exampleZh: 與大多數勃根地白酒一樣，它完全由夏多內葡萄釀製而成。

definition: (short scale) A million million: 1 followed by twelve zeros, 1012.
example: The Andromeda Galaxy is about twenty trillion kilometers from Earth.
exampleZh: 仙女座星系距離地球約二十兆公里。

definition: The state or condition of being a human being
example: He feared the speedy decline of all manhood.
exampleZh: 他擔心所有男子氣概都會迅速衰退。

definition: A place where anything is kept in store
example: A reservoir was created to collect rainwater.
exampleZh: 建造了一個水庫來收集雨水。

definition: An exhalation.
example: The earth exhales vapor; marshes exhale noxious effluvia.
exampleZh: 大地呼出水蒸氣；沼澤地呼出有毒的臭氣。

definition: A native or inhabitant of the Caucasus.
example: Sami taught in a predominantly Caucasian school.
exampleZh: 薩米在一所以白人為主的學校任教。

definition: A bundle of possessions, often tied up in a sack; a swag.
example: John granted five charters to the City, and in this third charter he restored to the citizens two privileges, of which they had been deprived by Matilda and Henry II.
exampleZh: 約翰向這座城市授予了五項特許狀，在第三份特許狀中，他恢復了公民的兩項特權，這些特權被瑪蒂爾達和亨利二世剝奪了。

definition: A smooth, chewy, sticky confection made by heating sugar and other ingredients until the sugars polymerize and become sticky.
example: He drizzled caramel sauce over the cake.
exampleZh: 他把焦糖醬淋在蛋糕上。

definition: A false or unsupported, malicious statement (spoken, not written), especially one which is injurious to a person's reputation; the making of such a statement.
example: Slander is a crime.
exampleZh: 誹謗是犯罪行為。

definition: The action of rinsing.
example: I'll just give this knife a quick rinse.
exampleZh: 我會快速沖洗一下這把刀。

definition: A painting, drawing, sculpture or other piece of creative, visual art
example: The text has been reviewed, but the photographer hasn't delivered some of the artwork.
exampleZh: 文字已經審核，但攝影師尚未交付部分藝術作品。

definition: Of or pertaining to storms.
example: a stormy season or a stormy day
exampleZh: 暴風雨的季節或暴風雨的日子

definition: (somewhat derogatory) A person who is habitually drunk.
example: Tom's father was a drunkard.
exampleZh: 湯姆的父親是個酒鬼。

definition: A blanket or throw, usually crocheted or knitted.
example: Afghan democracy needs to be preserved even with nuclear bombs.
exampleZh: 即使使用核彈，阿富汗的民主也需要維護。

definition: The back side of anything, the part opposite its front, particularly:
example: The flaps and ailerons are connected to the backside of the wings.
exampleZh: 襟翼和副翼連接到機翼的背面。

definition: Remaining in its original, pristine state, undamaged; not altered.
example: There are practically no untouched forests left in Europe.
exampleZh: 歐洲幾乎沒有未受破壞的森林。
