definition: One's independent faculty of choice; the ability to be able to exercise one's choice or intention.
example: If God wills.
exampleZh: 如果上帝願意的話。

definition: A typically black formal jacket worn by men.
example: Ziri always wore a tuxedo.
exampleZh: 齊裡總是穿著燕尾服。

definition: To sodomize; to engage in anal sex.
example: I feel pretty bummed.
exampleZh: 我覺得很沮喪。

definition: Senses referring to subjective quality.
example: Silt has a finer particle size than sand, but not as fine as clay.
exampleZh: 淤泥的粒徑比沙子細，但不如黏土細。

definition: Animal excrement, especially that of common domestic farm animals and when used as fertilizer. Generally speaking, from cows, horses, sheep, pigs and chickens.
example: Fyodor shovels manure for a living.
exampleZh: 費奧多爾以鏟糞為生。

definition: An ecclesiastic title bestowed on some Roman Catholic clerics by the Pope
example: Calling him "Monsignor" seems too feudal.
exampleZh: 稱他為「大人」似乎太封建了。

definition: One who seeks.
example: Algeria accepted him as an asylum seeker.
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞接受他作為尋求庇護者。

definition: To allow to be used by someone temporarily, on condition that it or its equivalent will be returned.
example: Lending spoils relationships.
exampleZh: 借貸會破壞人際關係。

definition: A period of 2 weeks.
example: How about Thursday fortnight?
exampleZh: 兩週星期四怎麼樣？

definition: An investigation of a corpse to determine the cause of death.
example: The postmortem showed that she had been strangled.
exampleZh: 驗屍顯示她是被勒死的。

definition: The devil.
example: She can go to the dickens for what she said.
exampleZh: 她可以去狄更斯那裡聽聽她說的話。

definition: To close or lock as if with a latch.
example: Ziri fixed the broken window latch.
exampleZh: 齊裡修好了破損的窗閂。

definition: Meal made from rolled or round oats.
example: I bake oatmeal cookies every Monday.
exampleZh: 我每週一烤燕麥餅乾。

definition: Noon; twelve o'clock during the day
example: Please come home at midday.
exampleZh: 請中午回家。

definition: Perquisite.
example: Free coffee is one of the perks of the job.
exampleZh: 免費咖啡是這份工作的福利之一。

definition: An unmarried person.
example: Mennad remained unmarried.
exampleZh: 門納德至今未婚。

definition: (sheepdog trials) The sheepdog's initial run towards the sheep, done in a curving motion so as not to startle them.
example: Can a tiger outrun a lion?
exampleZh: 老虎能跑得過獅子嗎？

definition: Such a file transfer.
example: You will have to convert your photograph to a jpg format if you wish to upload it.
exampleZh: 如果您想上傳照片，則必須將其轉換為 jpg 格式。

definition: A Bowie knife
example: David Bowie was born in south-east London.
exampleZh: 大衛·鮑伊出生於倫敦東南部。

definition: To produce an object identical to a given object.
example: Stop copying me.
exampleZh: 別再抄襲我了

definition: The interior part of a country.
example: an inland town
exampleZh: 一個內陸城鎮

definition: To knock against or run into with a jolt.
example: I'm bumping this.
exampleZh: 我正在碰這個。

definition: In a humble manner.
example: Tom smiled humbly.
exampleZh: 湯姆謙虛地笑了笑。

definition: A type of large constricting snake.
example: Python is a programming language.
exampleZh: Python是一種程式語言。

definition: A developmental phase brought about by the action of hormones as part of the maturing process. For humans, there are three in total.
example: Puberty causes irreversible physical changes.
exampleZh: 青春期會導致不可逆轉的身體變化。

definition: To kill all of (a population of pests or undesirables), usually intentionally.
example: We'll use poison to exterminate the rats.
exampleZh: 我們要用毒藥消滅老鼠。

definition: The noise of a horn or whistle.
example: Toots Zynsky helped invent a special machine that produces the glass threads which are a signature of her pieces.
exampleZh: Toots Zynsky 幫助發明了一種特殊的機器，可以生產玻璃絲，這是她作品的標誌。

definition: A sterol lipid synthesized by the liver and transported in the bloodstream to the membranes of all animal cells; it plays a central role in many biochemical processes and, as a lipoprotein that coats the walls of blood vessels, is associated with cardiovascular disease.
example: improve your cholesterol; lower your cholesterol
exampleZh: 改善你的膽固醇；降低膽固醇

definition: The simplest aliphatic hydrocarbon, CH₄, being a constituent of natural gas, and one of the most abundant greenhouse gases.
example: Cattle emit a large amount of methane.
exampleZh: 牛排放大量甲烷。

definition: To sublimate.
example: The cities of planet Vulcan are more sublime than Earth's.
exampleZh: 瓦肯星球上的城市比地球上的城市更宏偉。

definition: Something attached to something else; an attachment or accompaniment.
example: Boldi's appendix was being removed.
exampleZh: 博爾迪的闌尾被切除。

definition: Continued dull pain, as distinguished from sudden twinges, or spasmodic pain.
example: My tooth aches.
exampleZh: 我的牙疼。

definition: A long, broad and thick piece of timber, as opposed to a board which is less thick.
example: Germanization was a central plank of German conservative thinking in the 19th and 20th centuries.
exampleZh: 德國化是 19 世紀和 20 世紀德國保守主義思想的核心支柱。

definition: One who is alone, lacking or avoiding the company of others.
example: I actually enjoy being a loner.
exampleZh: 我其實很享受獨處的感覺。

definition: To run quickly or for a short distance.
example: You look dashing.
exampleZh: 你看起來很瀟灑。

definition: A hunt or pursuit; a chase.
example: Rima and Skura drove a Chevy.
exampleZh: 裡瑪和斯庫拉開著一輛雪佛蘭。

definition: A person who works in a mine.
example: Ziri became a miner.
exampleZh: 齊裡成為一名礦工。

definition: The shelf above a fireplace which may be also a structural support for the masonry of the chimney.
example: At the meeting, she finally assumed the mantle of leadership of the party.
exampleZh: 會上，她終於擔負起了黨的領導職務。

definition: A person who is senile.
example: My grandpa has become really senile these days.
exampleZh: 這幾天我爺爺真的老了。

definition: A small fighting force specially trained for making quick destructive raids against enemy-held areas.
example: It's called commando when you don't wear underwear beneath your pants.
exampleZh: 當你不在褲子下面穿內衣時，這被稱為突擊隊。

definition: Water in which food (meat or vegetable etc) has been boiled.
example: While broth boils, friendship blooms.
exampleZh: 當肉湯沸騰時，友誼就會綻放。

definition: The situation or occurrence in which two or more objects or events act upon one another to produce a new effect; the effect resulting from such a situation or occurrence.
example: We wanted more interaction.
exampleZh: 我們想要更多的互動。

definition: A tropical Asian plant (Sesamum indicum) bearing small flat seeds used as food and as a source of oil.
example: Sesame seeds should be ground and then eaten.
exampleZh: 芝麻應磨碎後食用。

definition: Something that restrains, ties, fastens or secures
example: Institutionally, a major restraint is the copyright problem.
exampleZh: 從制度上來說，一個主要的限制是版權問題。

definition: To eat quickly, greedily, hungrily, or ravenously.
example: I devour novels.
exampleZh: 我如飢似渴地看小說。

definition: The act of governing
example: They govern themselves.
exampleZh: 他們自我管理。

definition: Relating to respiration; breathing.
example: Algerian hospitals need more respiratory equipment.
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞醫院需要更多呼吸設備。

definition: (of a married person) To run away from home with a paramour.
example: Let's elope together.
exampleZh: 我們一起私奔吧。

definition: Something wrecked, especially the remains or debris of something which has been severely damaged or destroyed.
example: Many survivors were rescued from the wreckage.
exampleZh: 許多倖存者從廢墟中被救出。

definition: Old furniture or other items that take up room, or are stored away.
example: Nowadays, finding good lumber is hard.
exampleZh: 如今，尋找優質木材非常困難。

definition: A seasoned Italian sausage made from beef, pork or veal.
example: Nicolaus Copernicus studied canon law at the university of Bologna.
exampleZh: 尼古拉·哥白尼在博洛尼亞大學學習教會法。

definition: A mindset; a way of thinking; a set of beliefs.
example: Before he can succeed, he will have to shed the mentality that he can get by without hard work.
exampleZh: 在他能夠成功之前，他必須擺脫不勞而獲的心態。

definition: A musical instrument consisting principally of a set of graduated steel plates struck with hammers that are activated by a keyboard.
example: Celeste is making dumplings in the kitchen.
exampleZh: 塞萊斯特正在廚房包餃子。

definition: Severe overheating of the core of a nuclear reactor resulting in the core melting and radiation escaping.
example: Four years have passed since the meltdown at the Chernobyl nuclear plant, but the grim legacy of the Soviet catastrophe is still unfolding. https//web.archive.org/web/20041130094534/http://www.time.com/time/daily/chernobyl/chernobyl.index.html
exampleZh: 切爾諾貝利核電廠熔毀已經過了四年，但蘇聯災難的可怕後果仍在顯現。 https://web.archive.org/web/20041130094534/http://www.time.com/time/daily/chernobyl/chernobyl.index.html

definition: Of or pertaining to milk, or the secretion of milk.
example: galactic acid
exampleZh: 半乳糖酸

definition: A person with an extraordinary intellect or skill that is markedly superior to his or her peers.
example: Rodrigo is the operation’s mastermind.
exampleZh: 羅德里戈是該行動的策劃者。

definition: The shore or beach of the sea or ocean; shore; beach.
example: Grand Strand
exampleZh: 格蘭德斯特蘭德

definition: A Mexican dish consisting of a flour tortilla wrapped around a filling of meat and/or beans, cheese etc.
example: He rolled the perfect burrito.
exampleZh: 他捲出了完美的墨西哥捲餅。

definition: To conceal information by means of a code or cipher.
example: The encrypted text was unreadable.
exampleZh: 加密的文字無法讀取。

definition: A disciplinary action.
example: Debt can motivate or act as a disciplinary force for executives to achieve organizational efficiency.
exampleZh: 債務可以激勵或充當高階主管實現組織效率的紀律力量。

definition: To favor; to render successful.
example: Will Algeria prosper economically?
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞經濟會繁榮嗎？

definition: Broken bricks, stone and/or other aggregate used as foundations, especially in road and path laying.
example: He's a hardcore gamer.
exampleZh: 他是一名鐵桿遊戲玩家。

definition: Rapid and without delay.
example: Make it snappy!
exampleZh: 讓它變得敏捷！

definition: A usually alphabetized and explained collection of words e.g. of a particular field, or prepared for a specific purpose, often for learning.
example: My Russian vocabulary is very limited.
exampleZh: 我的俄語詞彙量非常有限。

definition: To make a vow; to promise.
example: The wronged woman vowed revenge.
exampleZh: 受委屈的女人發誓要報仇。

definition: An instrument for throwing stones or other missiles, consisting of a short strap with two strings fastened to its ends, or with a string fastened to one end and a light stick to the other.
example: a Singapore sling
exampleZh: 新加坡吊帶

definition: Of, characterized by, or pertaining to murder or murderers.
example: She gave me a murderous look.
exampleZh: 她給了我一個充滿殺氣的眼神。

definition: The day of the week or month, or the specific day, on which an employee's wages or salary is paid.
example: Payday can't come soon enough.
exampleZh: 發薪日來得還不夠快。

definition: To make somebody able (to do, or to be, something); to give sufficient ability or power to do or to be; to give strength or ability to.
example: Enable password-based authentication.
exampleZh: 啟用基於密碼的身份驗證。

definition: Any of numerous marine plants and algae, such as a kelp.
example: Japanese sometimes put seaweed in their spaghetti dishes.
exampleZh: 日本人有時會在義大利麵中加入海藻。

definition: Being in the state of delirium.
example: Karl was delirious.
exampleZh: 卡爾神智不清。

definition: A person who is part machine, a robot who is part organic.
example: Antonio demonstrated the superhuman strength of his cyborg.
exampleZh: 安東尼奧展示了他的機器人的超人力量。

definition: Celebrating victory.
example: Athena, war's triumphant maid...
exampleZh: 雅典娜，戰爭勝利的女僕…

definition: In a brave manner.
example: Boris fought bravely.
exampleZh: 鮑里斯英勇作戰。

definition: A three-dimensional image of an object created by holography.
example: Tom wasn't really performing at the concert. That was just his hologram.
exampleZh: 湯姆並沒有真正在音樂會上表演。那隻是他的全息圖。

definition: To transport by drawing or pulling, as with horses or oxen, or a motor vehicle.
example: What are you hauling?
exampleZh: 你拖著什麼？

definition: Something which projects, protrudes, juts out, sticks out, or stands out.
example: That's projection.
exampleZh: 那就是投影。

definition: That which is believed; accepted doctrine, especially religious doctrine; a particular set of beliefs; any summary of principles or opinions professed or adhered to.
example: A creed is a manifesto of religious or spiritual beliefs
exampleZh: 信條是宗教或精神信仰的宣言

definition: In a steady manner.
example: Everything is steadily deteriorating.
exampleZh: 一切都在穩定惡化。

definition: To declare or find innocent or not guilty.
example: The jury acquitted the prisoner of the charge.
exampleZh: 陪審團宣判囚犯無罪。

definition: To interfere in or with; to concern oneself with unduly.
example: Do not meddle in this.
exampleZh: 不要插手此事。

definition: A man who rides a horse.
example: Being a good horseman doesn't suffice in order to be a good leader.
exampleZh: 僅僅成為一名優秀的騎手並不足以成為一名優秀的領導者。

definition: A large mass or body of snow and ice sliding swiftly down a mountain side, or falling down a precipice.
example: The avalanche killed fifteen people.
exampleZh: 雪崩造成十五人死亡。

definition: The ball of the eye
example: We had an eyeball last year.
exampleZh: 去年我們有一個眼球。

definition: The quality or condition of being urgent
example: the urgency of a demand
exampleZh: 需求的迫切性

definition: One who, or that which, bears, sustains, or carries.
example: I promise to pay the bearer on demand.
exampleZh: 我保證按要求向持票人付款。

definition: To cause to fly; put to flight; drive off (by frightening).
example: Fleas are everywhere downstairs.
exampleZh: 樓下到處都是跳蚤。

definition: A fire in which bones are burned.
example: Lorenzo was still sitting by the bonfire.
exampleZh: 洛倫佐仍然坐在篝火旁。

definition: Lacking knowledge or understanding; uninformed.
example: Everyone's clueless.
exampleZh: 大家都一無所知。

definition: A person who is a supporter of capitalism.
example: capitalist countries
exampleZh: 資本主義國家

definition: A merchant dealing in fabrics and textiles, especially silks and other fine cloths.
example: Mr. Mercer, who in 1846 was the principal civil officer of Government at Badulla, sent me a jagged fragment of an elephant’s tusk, about five inches in diameter, and weighing between twenty and thirty pounds, which had been brought to him by some natives, who, being attracted by a noise in the jungle, witnessed a combat between a tusker and one without tusks, and saw the latter with his trunk seize one of the tusks of his antagonist and wrench from it the portion in question, which measured two feet in length.
exampleZh: 默瑟先生於 1846 年擔任巴杜勒政府首席文職官員，他寄給我一塊鋸齒狀的象牙碎片，直徑約 5 英寸，重量在 20 到 30 磅之間，這是一些當地人給他帶來的，他們被叢林中的噪音所吸引，目睹了有像牙和沒有像牙的人之間的戰鬥，並看到後者用鼻子上了一根牙齒的長度。

definition: A deliberate heavy footfall; a stamp.
example: She obliterated the cockroach with one stomp.
exampleZh: 她一腳就把蟑螂踩死了。

definition: A frequency or rate.
example: Beethoven's tempo was strange because his metronome was broken.
exampleZh: 貝多芬的節奏很奇怪，因為他的節拍器壞了。

definition: A musical instrument producing a sound when struck, similar to a bell (e.g. a tubular metal bar) or actually a bell. Often used in the plural to refer to the set: the chimes.
example: Hugo was a chime player in the school orchestra.
exampleZh: 雨果是學校管弦樂團的編鐘手。

definition: Rough; jumpy; causing or characterized by jolts and irregular movements
example: Hang on tight. Bumpy road ahead.
exampleZh: 緊緊抓住。前路坎坷。

definition: Having the atmosphere, decoration, or attitude of a festival, holiday, or celebration.
example: The room was decked out in festive streamers, with flowers everywhere.
exampleZh: 房間裡掛滿了節慶的彩帶，到處都是花。

definition: The exercise of authority or power in a burdensome, cruel, or unjust manner.
example: The oppression of the poor by the aristocracy was one cause of the French Revolution.
exampleZh: 貴族對窮人的壓迫是法國大革命的原因之一。

definition: A state or situation of great confusion, disorder, trouble or destruction; chaos.
example: In all the mayhem, some children were separated from their partners.
exampleZh: 在所有的混亂中，有些孩子與他們的伴侶失散了。

definition: A hamburger containing cheese (usually one or more slices of processed cheese).
example: My bicycle is a cheeseburger.
exampleZh: 我的腳踏車是一個起司漢堡。

definition: (dated in US) A male person.
example: Hi, geezer, you alright?
exampleZh: 嗨，老兄，你還好嗎？

definition: Someone who sells their services to clients without a long-term employment contract.
example: He was a freelance writer for several magazines.
exampleZh: 他是多家雜誌的自由撰稿人。

definition: The belt-like region of the celestial sphere approximately eight degrees north and south of the ecliptic which include the apparent path of the sun, moon, and visible planets.
example: There's no classier zodiac sign than Capricorns themselves.
exampleZh: 沒有比摩羯座更優雅的星座了。

definition: A small unspecified object; bric-a-brac (in plural)
example: All of the cakes and whatnot have been laid out, ready for the children's birthday party this afternoon.
exampleZh: 所有的蛋糕什麼的都已經擺好了，準備今天下午孩子們的生日派對。

definition: A surface created by projecting a closed two-dimensional curve along an axis intersecting the plane of the curve.
example: When the two-dimensional curve is a circle, the cylinder is called a circular cylinder. When the axis is perpendicular to the plane of the curve, the cylinder is called a right cylinder. In non-mathematical usage, both right and circular are usually implied.
exampleZh: 當二維曲線為圓時，圓柱體稱為圓柱體。當軸線垂直於曲線平面時，圓柱稱為直圓柱。在非數學用法中，通常隱含右式和循環式。

definition: A local tax, paid originally to the lord or ruler and later to a sheriff.
example: Do the Scots have their own language?
exampleZh: 蘇格蘭人有自己的語言嗎？

definition: To make holes in (an object or surface).
example: Shrapnel holed the ship's hull.
exampleZh: 彈片在船體上留下了一個洞。

definition: A small bag usually closed with a drawstring.
example: The joey snuggled down into the warm kangaroo pouch of his mother.
exampleZh: 小袋鼠依偎在媽媽溫暖的袋鼠育兒袋裡。

definition: Bringing or warranting disgrace; shameful.
example: It was disgraceful.
exampleZh: 這是可恥的。

definition: The rising or ascent of an aircraft or rocket into flight.
example: The flight was smooth, but the takeoff was a little rough.
exampleZh: 飛行很順利，但起飛時有點困難。

definition: A brief extra performance, done after the main performance is complete.
example: Can I get an encore? We want more!
exampleZh: 我可以再演一次嗎？我們想要更多！

definition: A covering, usually a bandage, for the eyes, blocking light to the eyes.
example: I put a blindfold over my boyfriend's eyes and told him I had a surprise for him.
exampleZh: 我用眼罩蒙住男友的眼睛，告訴他我要給他一個驚喜。

definition: A thing or being, event or process, perceptible through senses; or a fact or occurrence thereof.
example: Extreme weather phenomena are becoming ever more frequent.
exampleZh: 極端天氣現象變得越來越頻繁。

definition: An act in the past which may be used as an example to help decide the outcome of similar instances in the future.
example: He set a precedent.
exampleZh: 他開創了先例。

definition: A jerk; a person who is unlikable, detestable, or contemptible because he or she is stupid, foolish, clumsy, oafish, inept, malicious, or unpleasant.
example: A schmuck is someone who is easily taken advantage of.
exampleZh: schmuck 是指很容易被利用的人。

definition: A small light axe with a short handle; a tomahawk.
example: Sami and Layla buried their hatchet.
exampleZh: 薩米和萊拉冰釋前嫌。

definition: A fine granular substance produced in flowers. Technically a collective term for pollen grains (microspores) produced in the anthers of flowering plants. (This specific usage dating from mid 18th century.)
example: "...and ther was good wyne of Gascoyne,... as well of pollen, as of other vitailes..." Froissart, Jean, 1338?-1410?; Berners, John Bourchier, Lord https//archive.org/details/chroniclefroiss00froigoog
exampleZh: 「……還有加斯科因的好酒……以及花粉和其他維泰爾……」Froissart，Jean，1338？ -1410？ ；伯納斯，約翰·布爾奇耶勳爵 https://archive.org/details/chroniclefroiss00froigoog

definition: Written law, as laid down by the legislature.
example: The statute of limitations has already passed for this crime.
exampleZh: 該罪名已經過了訴訟時效。

definition: To control or select something with a dial, or (figuratively) as if with a dial.
example: Tom immediately dialed 911.
exampleZh: 湯姆立即撥打了 911。

definition: A state or federal prison for convicted felons; (broadly) a prison.
example: Daniel was imprisoned for thirty-five years in that penitentiary.
exampleZh: 丹尼爾在監獄裡被監禁了三十五年。

definition: A small musical group.
example: The jazz combo played nightly at the little restaurant.
exampleZh: 爵士樂組合每晚都會在小餐廳演奏。

definition: To deal effectively with something, especially if difficult.
example: I had trouble coping.
exampleZh: 我很難應付。

definition: In a hypothetical way; as a hypothesis.
example: He offered the proposition hypothetically.
exampleZh: 他提出了假設性的建議。

definition: A dressing made from vegetable oil, raw egg yolks and seasoning, used on salads, with french fries, in sandwiches etc.
example: We served a lobster mayonnaise as a starter.
exampleZh: 我們提供了龍蝦蛋黃醬作為開胃菜。

definition: A part or division of the intestines, usually the large intestine.
example: Tom was diagnosed with irritable bowel syndrome.
exampleZh: 湯姆被診斷出患有腸躁症。

definition: Of or relating to the biological theory of evolution.
example: The evolutionary history of marine mammals includes land-dwelling ancestors.
exampleZh: 海洋哺乳動物的演化史包括陸地祖先。

definition: A grape plantation, especially one used in the production of wine.
example: The vineyard of Château Margaux stands as the producer of one of the world's greatest and most sought-after red wines.
exampleZh: 瑪歌酒莊的葡萄園是世界上最偉大、最受歡迎的紅酒的生產商之一。

definition: Water containing dissolved salt.
example: a saline taste
exampleZh: 鹹味

definition: A magazine targeting an adult male audience and containing nude or semi-nude photographs of women.
example: Mary is not a girlie girl.
exampleZh: 瑪麗不是一個娘娘腔的女孩。

definition: To give (especially public) notice of (something); to announce publicly.
example: For personal needs, advertise on the internet or in a local newspaper.
exampleZh: 出於個人需求，請在網路或當地報紙上做廣告。

definition: Based on unanimity, assent or agreement.
example: The debate went on for hours, but in the end the decision was unanimous.
exampleZh: 辯論持續了幾個小時，但最終一致決定。

definition: A non-Greek or a non-Roman.
example: My level 9 barbarian has died.
exampleZh: 我的9級野蠻人死了。

definition: To make tea or coffee by mixing tea leaves or coffee beans with hot water.
example: A conflict is brewing.
exampleZh: 一場衝突正在醞釀。

definition: To hurt, usually by introducing poison or a sharp point, or both.
example: Right so came out an adder of a little heathbush, and it stung a knight in the foot.
exampleZh: 就這樣，一條小石南叢中出現了一條蝰蛇，它蜇了一位騎士的腳。

definition: (with for) missing one's home and family very much when away; nostalgic
example: Sami was homesick.
exampleZh: 薩米想家了。

definition: A Christian sacrament, by which one is received into a church and sometimes given a name, generally involving the candidate to be anointed with or submerged in water.
example: She went to be churched before the baptism.
exampleZh: 她在受洗前去了教堂。

definition: A sudden, loud thunder caused by a nearby lightning strike; a shock of thunder, as opposed to a reverberating rumble
example: The thunderclap echoed loudly through the dark sky.
exampleZh: 雷霆轟鳴，響徹漆黑的天空。

definition: Very difficult or impossible to forget
example: The things he subjected me to were horrible and unforgettable.
exampleZh: 他讓我經歷的事情是可怕而難忘的。

definition: To review each image on a digital camera after it is taken.
example: The angry chimp went up the sidewalk and ripped everybody's face off.
exampleZh: 憤怒的黑猩猩走上人行道，撕掉了每個人的臉。

definition: In a manner that is impossible to avoid or prevent.
example: Despite the town's best efforts, the dam inevitably gave way.
exampleZh: 儘管該鎮盡了最大努力，大壩還是不可避免地垮塌了。

definition: Punishment inflicted in the spirit of moral outrage or personal vengeance.
example: When the system is failing, violent acts of retribution increase.
exampleZh: 當系統故障時，暴力報復行為就會增加。

definition: (temporal location) At a later or succeeding time.
example: Afterward, she felt remorseful.
exampleZh: 事後，她感到懊悔。

definition: The body of a dead animal.
example: The rabbit carcass was crawling with maggots.
exampleZh: 兔子的屍體上爬滿了蛆。

definition: A substitute (usually of a person, position or role).
example: A mixture of horseradish and mustard often serves as a surrogate for wasabi.
exampleZh: 辣根和芥末的混合物通常用作芥末的替代品。

definition: Any thing or person that retains.
example: This lawyer charges a retainer for his work.
exampleZh: 這位律師為其工作收取聘用費。

definition: A lawyer of noncontentious private civil law who drafts, takes, and records legal instruments for private parties, and provides legal advice, but does not appear in court on clients' behalf.
example: The notary acted as an attester of the contract.
exampleZh: 公證人擔任契約的證明人。

definition: Without color; pale; pallid.
example: A bleak and bare rock.
exampleZh: 荒涼而光禿禿的岩石。

definition: Two similar or identical things taken together; often followed by of.
example: Do you write specs before you write code?
exampleZh: 你在寫程式之前先寫規範嗎？

definition: To pull (something) back, aside, or away.
example: Tom withdrew his accusation.
exampleZh: 湯姆撤回了指控。

definition: One who is degenerate, who has fallen from previous stature; an immoral person.
example: Live can so easily degenerate into something sordid and vulgar.
exampleZh: 生活很容易就墮落成骯髒、庸俗的東西。

definition: A state of wild activity or panic.
example: She went into a cleaning frenzy to prepare for the unexpected guests.
exampleZh: 她開始瘋狂地打掃衛生，為不速之客做準備。

definition: An artificial hill or elevation of earth; a raised bank; an embankment thrown up for defense
example: Ziri walked around the mound and found a wooden cross on it.
exampleZh: 茲裡繞著土丘走了一圈，發現上面有一個木製十字架。

definition: An archenemy
example: Batman is in constant conflict with his nemesis, The Joker.
exampleZh: 蝙蝠俠與他的宿敵小丑不斷發生衝突。

definition: A curved piece of wood attached to the bottom of a rocking chair or cradle that enables it to rock back and forth.
example: All modern surfboards share a similar rocker design — Bruce Jones https//web.archive.org/web/20051212041317/http://www.brucejones.com/longboar.htm
exampleZh: 所有現代衝浪板都具有相似的搖桿設計 - Bruce Jones https://web.archive.org/web/20051212041317/http://www.brucejones.com/longboar.htm

definition: A waft; a brief, gentle breeze; a light gust of air
example: I think I've gotten a whiff of coffee: quick, off to the kitchen!
exampleZh: 我想我聞到了一股咖啡的香味：快去廚房吧！

definition: Hair hanging over the forehead.
example: the fringe of a picture
exampleZh: 圖片的邊緣

definition: To label (something).
example: Mary tagged along.
exampleZh: 瑪莉也跟著跟著。

definition: To make sombre or dark; to make shady.
example: Even in Tom's funniest sketches, there is a somber note.
exampleZh: 即使在湯姆最有趣的草圖中，也有一個憂鬱的音符。

definition: Any alteration or change.
example: Gustavo wanted to avoid the mutation.
exampleZh: 古斯塔沃想要避免這種突變。

definition: Someone who attacks or assails another violently, or criminally.
example: The assailant was apprehended.
exampleZh: 襲擊者已被逮捕。

definition: The removal and examination of a sample of tissue, cells, or bodily fluid from a living body for diagnostic purposes.
example: We will need to perform a biopsy to determine whether the tumour is malignant or benign.
exampleZh: 我們需要進行活檢以確定腫瘤是惡性還是良性。

definition: Very soon; quickly; immediately.
example: Collective rules are not set straightaway but progressively win recognition.
exampleZh: 集體規則不是直接製定的​​，而是逐步贏得認可的。

definition: The calling back of a hawk.
example: Reclaim your surplus value: steal from work!
exampleZh: 收回你的剩餘價值：從工作中偷竊！

definition: Amusing; humorous; comical.
example: The angrier you get, the funnier you look.
exampleZh: 你越生氣，你看起來就越有趣。

definition: A person who has committed a felony.
example: I know that Tom is a convicted felon.
exampleZh: 我知道湯姆是一名被定罪的重罪犯。

definition: (grammar) The passive voice of verbs.
example: He remained passive during the protest.
exampleZh: 他在抗議期間保持被動。

definition: An adult male horse.
example: The magnificent stallion fetched a huge price at auction.
exampleZh: 這匹雄偉的種馬在拍賣會上拍出了天價。

definition: A common gambling card game in casinos, where the object is to get as close to 21 without going over.
example: They played a short round of blackjack before leaving the casino.
exampleZh: 他們在離開賭場之前玩了一小輪二十一點。

definition: Aggressively ambitious; overly assertive, bold or determined.
example: Parents are ruining school sports days by being pushy and overbearing, a survey suggests. BBC
exampleZh: 一項調查顯示，家長們因咄咄逼人和專橫而毀掉了學校的運動會。英國廣播公司

definition: A type of pasta in the form of short tubes; sometimes loosely, pasta in general.
example: Cover the macaroni completely with water.
exampleZh: 用水完全覆蓋通心粉。

definition: A breed of dog developed in England by the crossing of the bullbaiting dog and the Pug to produce a ladies companion dog. Having a very smooth coat, a flattened face, wrinkly cheeks, powerful front legs and smaller hind legs.
example: This bulldog is happy. The other one isn't.
exampleZh: 這隻鬥牛犬很高興。另一個則不然。

definition: A bicycle with no suspension system.
example: The deceased was rigid and livid.
exampleZh: 死者表情僵硬，臉色鐵青。

definition: A self-evident axiom or premise; a pithy expression of a general principle or rule.
example: It's a Kabyle maxim.
exampleZh: 這是卡比爾格言。

definition: The act, process, or result of reducing.
example: A 5% reduction in robberies
exampleZh: 搶劫案減少 5%

definition: The bone at the front of the skull, behind the forehead.
example: a frontal attack
exampleZh: 正面攻​​擊

definition: Identification with or understanding of the thoughts, feelings, or emotional state of another person.
example: She had a lot of empathy for her neighbor; she knew what it was like to lose a parent too.
exampleZh: 她對鄰居充滿同情心。她也知道失去父母是什麼感覺。

definition: To dig underneath (something), to make a passage for destructive or military purposes; to sap.
example: This could undermine Algeria's stability.
exampleZh: 這可能會破壞阿爾及利亞的穩定。

definition: An excessive load.
example: Challenge yourself with progressive overload.
exampleZh: 透過漸進式超負荷挑戰自己。

definition: The act of detecting or sensing something; discovering something that was hidden or disguised.
example: Sami risked detection.
exampleZh: 薩米冒著被發現的危險。

definition: Relating to the practice of cookery or the activity of cooking.
example: Her culinary skills were excellent.
exampleZh: 她的廚藝非常出色。

definition: Which has not suffered harm; which has not been injured or damaged
example: Edmundo remained unharmed.
exampleZh: 埃德蒙多安然無恙。

definition: A localized accumulation of pus in the skin, resulting from infection.
example: The water boils.
exampleZh: 水沸騰了。

definition: To make dizzy or unsteady.
example: The man became giddy upon standing up so fast.
exampleZh: 男人站起來的速度如此之快，頓時頭暈目眩。

definition: (travel) A nonstop journey, especially a nonstop flight.
example: There's a nonstop flight to Mauritius, but I'm not sitting on the same plane for thirteen hours.
exampleZh: 有直飛毛里求斯的航班，但我不會在同一架飛機上坐十三個小時。

definition: A game (originally Chinese) for four players, using a collection of tiles divided into five or six suits.
example: Mahjong is a game four people play.
exampleZh: 麻將是四個人玩的遊戲。

definition: Soup noodles of wheat, with various ingredients (Japanese style)
example: We had some excellent ramen.
exampleZh: 我們吃了一些很棒的拉麵。

definition: A familiar appellation of civility.
example: Amy Goodman is a courageous woman.
exampleZh: 艾米·古德曼是一位勇敢的女性。

definition: Of or resembling a slut.
example: The makeup, high heels and short skirt made her look so slutty.
exampleZh: 妝容、高跟鞋和短裙讓她看起來很放蕩。

definition: Artillery soldier, or such who holds private rank. Abbreviated Gnr.
example: Tim's uncle was a machine gunner on a helicopter in Vietnam.
exampleZh: 提姆的叔叔是越南一架直升機上的機槍手。

definition: The act of spending the night as a guest in another's house, especially when the participants are children.
example: Carlos had a sleepover for his birthday.
exampleZh: 卡洛斯生日那天在外過夜。

definition: A person who is transformed or can transform into a wolf or a wolflike human, often said to transform during a full moon.
example: Tonight belongs to the fireflies and the bats—and the werewolves.
exampleZh: 今晚屬於螢火蟲和蝙蝠——還有狼人。

definition: A systematic list of names, books, pictures etc.
example: Ziri carefully studied the auction catalog.
exampleZh: 紫日仔細研究了拍賣圖錄。

definition: A person to whom paranormal powers are attributed.
example: Karl started experiencing paranormal activities.
exampleZh: 卡爾開始經歷超自然現象。

definition: A person whose lifestyle is centered on motorcycles, sometimes a member of a motorcycle club.
example: This track is a challenge for any mountain biker.
exampleZh: 這條賽道對任何山地自行車手來說都是一個挑戰。

definition: An almost transparent aquatic animal; any one of the acalephs, especially one of the larger species, having a jellylike appearance.
example: Do jellyfish have consciousness?
exampleZh: 水母有意識嗎？

definition: A financial instrument issued by a municipality.
example: Behind that building is the municipal pool.
exampleZh: 建築後面是市政游泳池。

definition: A noisy disturbance and/or commotion.
example: The leopard was making a huge ruckus.
exampleZh: 豹子發出了巨大的騷動。

definition: Closeness; the state of being near as in space, time, or relationship.
example: The proximity of the heat source allowed it to be detected by the sensor.
exampleZh: 熱源的接近使得感測器能夠檢測到它。

definition: A small community, often rural, whose members share in the ownership of property, and in the division of labour; the members of such a community.
example: The commune distributed the food fairly.
exampleZh: 公社公平分配食物。

definition: (history) A communist who operated underground and was therefore not available for a political leadership position.
example: A cold, reserved man, he was seen as emotionally unavailable.
exampleZh: 他是一個冷漠、矜持的人，被認為在感情上難以相處。

definition: A soldier of private rank in cavalry or armour.
example: He was a real trooper about taking care of the kids for the weekend.
exampleZh: 他是一個真正的士兵，在周末照顧孩子們。

definition: A group of igneous and plutonic rocks composed primarily of feldspar and quartz. Usually contains one or more dark minerals, which may be mica, pyroxene, or amphibole. Granite is quarried for building stone, road gravel, decorative stone, and tombstones. Common colors are gray, white, pink, and yellow-brown.
example: Many monuments are crafted from beautiful, marbled granite.
exampleZh: 許多紀念碑都是用美麗的大理石花崗岩製成的。

definition: (systems theory) An underlying base or foundation especially for an organization or system.
example: The parasitic tyranny's infrastructure depends on secrecy in order to be effective.
exampleZh: 寄生暴政的基礎設施依賴保密才能發揮作用。

definition: Lacking any form of defense; vulnerable; open to attack.
example: Tom felt completely defenseless.
exampleZh: 湯姆感到完全毫無防備。

definition: A mountain.
example: There are tall menhirs at Egil's barrow.
exampleZh: 埃吉爾的手推車上有高大的紀念碑。

definition: A lace collar that covers the shoulders of a dress
example: Bertha Pappenheim described psychoanalysis as "the talking cure".
exampleZh: 伯莎·帕彭海姆 (Bertha Pappenheim) 將精神分析描述為「談話療法」。

definition: A person who supervises students as they take an examination, in the United States at the college/university level; often the department secretary, or a fellow/graduate student; an invigilator.
example: The proctor walked slowly up and down the aisles during the examination.
exampleZh: 考試期間，監考官在走道上緩慢地走來走去。

definition: An advocate of feminism; a person who believes in bringing about the equality of the sexes (of women and men) in all aspects of public and private life
example: Maria is a feminist.
exampleZh: 瑪麗亞是一位女權主義者。

definition: Rapid circular motion.
example: Uranus spins sideways.
exampleZh: 天王星橫向旋轉。

definition: Flawed or damaged; unsound, liable to break apart; ramshackle.
example: Sami's pranks got crazier and crazier.
exampleZh: 薩米的惡作劇變得越來越瘋狂。

definition: Any solid object rounded at one end and tapering on the other, possibly attached to a larger object at the tapered end.
example: How are light bulbs recycled?
exampleZh: 燈泡如何回收？

definition: An infectious disease caused by species of Lyssavirus that causes acute encephalitis in warm-blooded animals and people, characterised by abnormal behaviour such as biting, excitement, aggressiveness, and dementia, followed by paralysis and death.
example: We are vaccinating you against rabies.
exampleZh: 我們正在為您接種狂犬病疫苗。

definition: The quality of being chaste: the state of abstaining from any sexual activity considered immoral; avoidance of sexual sins.
example: Her chastity belt set off the metal detector at the airport.
exampleZh: 她的貞操帶引爆了機場的金屬探測器。

definition: A circular band of metal used to bind a barrel.
example: Fadil made Layla jump through hoops.
exampleZh: 法迪爾讓萊拉跳進了鐵圈。

definition: A person who baptizes
example: Christians identify John the Baptist with the prophet Elijah.
exampleZh: 基督徒認為施洗約翰就是先知以利亞。

definition: A person who suffers from diabetes mellitus.
example: He became diabetic.
exampleZh: 他患上了糖尿病。

definition: A large body of ice which flows under its own mass, usually downhill.
example: They warned that the effects of glacier melting on water resources are becoming “increasingly serious” for China.
exampleZh: 他們警告說，冰川融化對中國水資源的影響正變得「越來越嚴重」。

definition: The process of rehabilitating somebody or something.
example: Prisons are euphemistically called rehabilitation centers.
exampleZh: 監獄被委婉地稱為康復中心。

definition: A single unborn offspring at any stage of gestation.
example: Inheritance law allows property to be left to the unborn.
exampleZh: 繼承法允許將財產留給未出生的人。

definition: The impression of the foot in a soft substance such as sand or snow.
example: This computer has a smaller footprint.
exampleZh: 這台計算機的佔地面積較小。

definition: A single item of clothing.
example: Algeria needs to develop its garment industry.
exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞需要發展其服裝業。

definition: A dire or unfortunate situation.
example: The documentary is meant to raise consciousness about the plight of the poor.
exampleZh: 這部紀錄片旨在提高人們對窮人困境的認識。

definition: One who kisses.
example: She's a great kisser!
exampleZh: 她是個很棒的接吻者！

definition: The selection of one thing or person over others (with the main adposition being "for" in relation to the thing or person, but possibly also "of")
example: He has a preference for crisp wines.
exampleZh: 他偏愛清爽的葡萄酒。

definition: To strike something sharply with one's knuckles; knock.
example: Sami was rapping.
exampleZh: 薩米在說唱。

definition: The cry of a cat.
example: The catfish meows.
exampleZh: 鯰魚喵喵叫。

definition: Evasive and shifty
example: Asked why, a spokesman gave a dodgy answer about legal ramifications.
exampleZh: 當被問及原因時，一位發言人對法律後果給了一個狡猾的答案。

definition: The series of vertebrae, separated by disks, that encloses and protects the spinal cord, and runs down the middle of the back in vertebrate animals.
example: Before automobiles, railroads were a backbone of commerce.
exampleZh: 在汽車出現之前，鐵路是商業的支柱。

definition: An optical phenomenon in which light is refracted through a layer of hot air close to the ground, giving the appearance of there being refuge in the distance.
example: What's the difference between a mirage and a hallucination?
exampleZh: 海市蜃樓和幻覺有什麼差別？

definition: Full of virtue, having excellent moral character.
example: Successful communities need strong, selfless leaders and a virtuous people.
exampleZh: 成功的社區需要強大、無私的領導者和有道德的人民。

definition: A grizzly bear.
example: Shotgun blast kills charging grizzly!
exampleZh: 霰彈槍射殺衝鋒的灰熊！

definition: A question.
example: scientific enquiry
exampleZh: 科學探究

definition: To gain (success, reward, recognition) through applied effort or work.
example: Rima earns money.
exampleZh: 瑞瑪賺錢了。

definition: The state of forgetting completely, of being oblivious, unconscious, unaware, as when sleeping, drunk, or dead.
example: He regularly drank himself into oblivion.
exampleZh: 他常常喝得酩酊大醉。

definition: Of or akin to; related; like
example: And though he knew his brethren, he was not known by them.
exampleZh: 儘管他認識他的弟兄，但他們卻不認識他。

definition: A bookmaker, being a person who, or business which, takes bets from the general public on sporting events and similar.
example: Are you a bookie?
exampleZh: 你是書迷嗎？

definition: Forgetfulness; cessation of remembrance of wrong; oblivion.
example: War criminals should not benefit from amnesty or impunity.
exampleZh: 戰犯不應受益於特赦或有罪不罰。

definition: The rubbing of one object or surface against another.
example: The friction between the Americans and the British mounted.
exampleZh: 美國人和英國人之間的摩擦不斷加劇。

definition: Zany; eccentric
example: Remember "Wacky Races"? Watch the US primary, it's its spitting image!
exampleZh: 還記得「古怪的賽車」嗎？看看美國初選，簡直就是一模一樣！

definition: To rotate about an off-centre fixed point.
example: The plant swung in the breeze.
exampleZh: 植物在微風中搖曳。

definition: A farewell, a goodbye; especially a fond farewell, or a lasting or permanent farewell.
example: With a shrug and some sorrow, Europeans bid 'Adieu' to EU member Britain.
exampleZh: 歐洲人聳聳肩，帶著些許悲傷，向歐盟成員國英國說「再見」。

definition: Characterized by, or conducive to poor health
example: The villagers lived in unhealthy surroundings.
exampleZh: 村民生活環境惡劣。

definition: Of high prestige.
example: She has a prestigious job with an international organization.
exampleZh: 她在國際組織中擁有一份享有盛譽的工作。

definition: An expert in pathology; a specialist who examines samples of body tissues for diagnostic or forensic purpose.
example: Tom is a forensic pathologist.
exampleZh: 湯姆是一名法醫病理學家。

definition: A sexual partner, especially a woman, to whom one is not or cannot be married.
example: Rima was Gabriel’s concubine.
exampleZh: 莉瑪是加百列的妾。

definition: Full of.
example: I've just ridden sixty kilometres.
exampleZh: 我剛剛騎了六十公里。

definition: A horn used by hunters.
example: Tom played Reveille on his bugle every morning.
exampleZh: 湯姆每天早上都會​​用號角吹起床號。

definition: A scholar of one of the subjects in the humanities.
example: Is the humanitarian mission facing challenges?
exampleZh: 人道使命面臨挑戰嗎？

definition: Characterized by an absence of sleep.
example: I spent a sleepless night worrying about the exams.
exampleZh: 我因考試而徹夜難眠。

definition: A stretcher having wheeled legs.
example: Paramedics were carrying James on a gurney.
exampleZh: 醫護人員用輪床上抬著詹姆斯。

definition: The chemical element (Symbol Ca), with an atomic number 20. It is a soft, silvery-white alkaline earth metal which occurs naturally as carbonate in limestone and as silicate in many rocks.
example: Calcium is an essential mineral for the human body.
exampleZh: 鈣是人體必需的礦物質。

definition: A facial expression in which the eyebrows are brought together, and the forehead is wrinkled, usually indicating displeasure, sadness or worry, or less often confusion or concentration.
example: Don't frown.
exampleZh: 別皺眉。

definition: To build again.
example: rebuilt engine
exampleZh: 重建發動機

definition: (chiefly passive) To cause (someone) to go insane or become deranged.
example: He became temporarily deranged.
exampleZh: 他變得暫時精神錯亂。

definition: Mental or bodily distress.
example: Ziri needs to become comfortable with discomfort.
exampleZh: Ziri 需要適應不適。

definition: To kasher; to prepare (for example, meat) in conformity with the requirements of the Jewish law.
example: David's mother kept a kosher kitchen, with separate sets of dishes for meat and for dairy.
exampleZh: 大衛的母親擁有一間符合猶太潔食標準的廚房，裡面有單獨的肉類和乳製品餐具。

definition: Of, relating to, or involving technology, especially modern scientific technology.
example: He invented technological principles.
exampleZh: 他發明了技術原理。

definition: To be without, to need, to require.
example: He lacked ideas.
exampleZh: 他缺乏想法。

definition: Agent noun of drink; someone or something that drinks.
example: a bell drinker
exampleZh: 鐘形飲水器

definition: Someone with exceptional skills in a certain field.
example: She sure was a hotshot on the keyboard, 93 words per minute!
exampleZh: 她確實是鍵盤高手，每分鐘93個字！

definition: Not having any authority
example: I don't want unauthorized pictures of me on people's social media.
exampleZh: 我不想讓未經授權的我的照片出現在人們的社交媒體上。

definition: An evergreen shrub or small tree of the genus Myrtus, native to southern Europe and north Africa.
example: Mushrooms, strawberries, myrtle trees and so on come from the woods.
exampleZh: 蘑菇、草莓、桃金孃樹等都來自樹林。

definition: The act of placing or putting in place; the act of locating or positioning; the state of being placed.
example: It seems to me that the placement of that poster could be better.
exampleZh: 在我看來，那張海報的位置可能會更好。

definition: Distasteful, ignoble, vile, or contemptible.
example: Live can so easily degenerate into something sordid and vulgar.
exampleZh: 生活很容易就墮落成骯髒、庸俗的東西。

definition: A largely level expanse of land at a high elevation; tableland.
example: The panting breathless climbers were on the edge of the plateau.
exampleZh: 氣喘吁籲的登山者已經到了高原的邊緣。

definition: A proportional part or share; the share or proportion assigned to each in a division.
example: We almost broke our necks trying to meet the quota.
exampleZh: 為了達到目標，我們差點摔斷脖子

definition: To adjust (a musical instrument) so that it produces the correct pitches.
example: Thanks for tuning in!
exampleZh: 感謝收聽！

definition: Any substance produced by one tissue and conveyed by the bloodstream to another to effect physiological activity.
example: Progesterone is a female hormone.
exampleZh: 黃體酮是一種女性荷爾蒙。

definition: The entirety of means whereby a specific production is made existent or task accomplished.
example: The fire department dispatched several fire apparatus to the scene.
exampleZh: 消防局出動多輛消防車趕赴現場。

definition: A white person from an English-speaking country, particularly the United States.
example: On a scale of "gringo" to "mero mero sabor ranchero", how good is my Spanish?
exampleZh: 從“gringo”到“mero mero sabor ranchero”，我的西班牙語有多好？

definition: A Good Samaritan
example: Tom was rescued by a Good Samaritan.
exampleZh: 湯姆被好心人救了。

definition: A systematic list of names, books, pictures etc.
example: Could you send me your last catalogue, please?
exampleZh: 你能把你最後的目錄寄給我嗎？

definition: (of people) Favoured by luck; fortunate; having good success or good fortune
example: Tom felt like the luckiest man on earth.
exampleZh: 湯姆覺得自己是世界上最幸運的人。

definition: To hawk or to peddle merchandise.
example: I bought chocolate from the vending machine.
exampleZh: 我從自動販賣機買了巧克力。

definition: (plural "housewives") A woman whose main employment is homemaking, maintaining the upkeep of her home and tending to household affairs; often, such a woman whose sole [unpaid] employment is homemaking.
example: Washing machines spare housewives a lot of trouble.
exampleZh: 洗衣機給家庭主婦免除了很多麻煩。

definition: A company of people that share the same interest or aim.
example: The Fellowship of the Ring
exampleZh: 指環聯誼會

definition: A liquid to consume; a drink, such as tea, coffee, liquor, beer, milk, juice, or soft drinks, usually excluding water.
example: Champagne is an alcoholic beverage.
exampleZh: 香檳是一種酒精飲料。

definition: To commit theft.
example: You thieving bastard!
exampleZh: 你這個小偷！

definition: To make unfit; to render unsuitable, spoil, disqualify.
example: Jack cannot run, making him unfit for the track team.
exampleZh: 傑克不能跑步，這使他不適合參加田徑隊。

definition: Relating to tides
example: The tidal barrier and flood walls need to be reinforced.
exampleZh: 防潮堤和防洪牆需要加固。

definition: An unborn or unhatched vertebrate showing signs of the mature animal.
example: Gustavo gave the fetus a proper burial.
exampleZh: 古斯塔沃為胎兒進行了妥善的埋葬。

definition: To trust to the care of.
example: Can I entrust you with a secret?
exampleZh: 我可以託付你一個秘密嗎？

definition: An omission; something that is left out, missed or forgotten.
example: A small oversight at this stage can lead to big problems later.
exampleZh: 這個階段的一個小疏忽可能會導致以後出現大問題。

definition: (used in street names) A road, street, or similar thoroughfare.
example: Tom changed lanes without signalling.
exampleZh: 湯姆在沒有打信號燈的情況下改變了車道。

definition: To move out of a dwelling, either by choice or by eviction.
example: I have to vacate my house by midday, as the new owner is moving in.
exampleZh: 由於新主人要搬進來，我必須在中午前搬出房子。

definition: Any of various economic and political theories advocating collective or governmental ownership and administration of the means of production and distribution of goods.
example: Socialism or barbarism.
exampleZh: 社會主義還是野蠻主義。

definition: Characterized by success
example: Trading Babe Ruth was far more prosperous for the Yankees than for the Red Sox.
exampleZh: 交易貝比魯斯對洋基隊來說比對紅襪隊來說要繁榮得多。

definition: An automatic response to a simple stimulus which does not require mental processing.
example: I've lost all gag reflex.
exampleZh: 我已經失去了所有的嘔吐反射。

definition: Something that blocks or obstructs a road.
example: Bruno complained to Rima about the roadblock.
exampleZh: 布魯諾向裡瑪抱怨路障。

definition: An investigation or inquiry into the truth of some matter
example: Nobody expects the Portuguese Inquisition.

exampleZh: 渡槽主管；營、艦隊、城市守衛或糧食的長官；禁衛軍太守，護衛皇帝的軍隊統帥

definition: The act of publishing printed or other matter.

definition: A military post stationed at a distance from the main body of troops.
example: The outpost did not have enough ammunition to resist a determined assault.
exampleZh: 前哨沒有足夠的彈藥來抵抗堅決的攻擊。

exampleZh: 他們對於臥室粉刷什麼顏色存在一些分歧，但他們已經達成了妥協。

example: Mary is still reading her horoscope.
exampleZh: 瑪麗仍在看她的星座運勢。

definition: A naval officer holding a rank between captain and rear admiral.
example: The Texas Instruments TI-99/4A mainly competed with the Commodore VIC-20.
exampleZh: 德州儀器 TI-99/4A 主要與 Commodore VIC-20 競爭。

definition: The drink of the gods.

exampleZh: 蜂鳥喝某些花朵的甜美花蜜。

example: a swarm of meteorites

definition: That branch of government which is responsible for maintaining the courts of law and for the administration of justice.
example: Maltese is used in legal and judicial proceedings in Malta.

definition: Sorbus aucuparia, the European rowan.

definition: A grassy quadrangle surrounded by cloisters

exampleZh: 維納香腸在維也納被稱為法蘭克福香腸。

definition: Free from pain; without pain or trouble.
example: The uroscan is a painless procedure.
exampleZh: 尿路掃描是一種無痛手術。

definition: To bind, compel, constrain, or oblige by a social, legal, or moral tie.
example: I feel somewhat obligated.
exampleZh: 我覺得有些義務。

definition: Tending to rouse aversion or to repulse

example: I recognized Tom from the billboard.
exampleZh: 我從廣告看板上認出了湯姆。

definition: To follow as a model or a pattern; to make a copy, counterpart or semblance of.
example: Imitate him.
exampleZh: 模仿他。

example: He waved goodbye.
exampleZh: 他揮手告別。

definition: An obstacle, delay, disadvantage, blow (an adverse event which retards or prevents progress towards a desired outcome)
example: A setback delayed our progress.
exampleZh: 一次挫折阻礙了我們的進步。

example: The public transport system runs like clockwork.
exampleZh: 大眾運輸系統運作得像發條一樣。

definition: A disorderly argument or fight, usually with a large number of people involved.
example: The meeting degenerated into a vicious brawl.
exampleZh: 會議演變成了一場惡毒的鬥毆。

definition: To render unable; to take away an ability of, as by crippling.
example: Disable password-based authentication.
exampleZh: 停用基於密碼的身份驗證。

definition: A person who discriminates on grounds of sex; someone who practises sexism.
example: Skura thinks Yanni is a sexist.
exampleZh: 斯庫拉認為雅尼是性別歧視者。

definition: To produce an image or copy of.
example: Western attitudes towards "authenticity" often reproduce stereotypes.
exampleZh: 西方對「真實性」的態度常常再現刻板印象。

example: I have to go potty!
exampleZh: 我得去上廁所！

definition: An edible round berry, belonging to the cowberry group (Vaccinium sect. Cyanococcus), with flared crowns at the end, that turns blue on ripening.
example: This is blueberry.
exampleZh: 這是藍莓。

definition: A horizontal component of a structure
example: 1667: As when the Sun new ris'n / Looks through the Horizontal misty Air — John Milton, Paradise Lost, Book 1, ll. 594-5

exampleZh: 如果沒有人監督，團隊就會缺乏方向。

definition: A repetitive style of music originally produced for use in a continuous DJ set. The central rhythmic component is most often in common time (4/4), where time is marked with a bass drum on each quarter note pulse, a backbeat played by snare or clap on the second and fourth pulses of the bar, and an open hi-hat sounding every second eighth note.
example: What's the difference between trance, house, and techno music?
exampleZh: trance、house 和 techno 音樂有什麼不同？

example: It was evident she was angry, after she slammed the door.
exampleZh: 關上門後，看得出來她很生氣。

example: Uranus' atmosphere is made up of hydrogen, helium, and methane.
exampleZh: 天王星的大氣層由氫、氦和甲烷組成。

definition: A lewd and disreputable person, often female, especially an unattractive person with an air of tawdry promiscuity.
example: She's a total skank.
exampleZh: 她真是個混蛋。

exampleZh: 婚姻是一對夫婦嘗試解決單身時永遠不會遇到的問題的嘗試。

exampleZh: 儘管她看上去年老體弱，但她仍然可以扔球。

example: The airfield on the island is now covered with weeds.
exampleZh: 島上的機場現在已長滿雜草。

It may be partly or wholly in the ground (except for its entrance) in a cemetery, or it may be inside a church proper or in its crypt. Single tombs may be permanently sealed; those for families (or other groups) have doors for access whenever needed.
example: The pyramids are tombs.
exampleZh: 金字塔是墳墓。

exampleZh: 瓢蟲是喜歡深紅色三葉草和毛野豌豆的甲蟲。

example: Tom is an environmental activist.
exampleZh: 湯姆是一位環保活動家。

exampleZh: 辦公室空調故障。

exampleZh: 我們聲明上述內容真實且正確，如有偽證，願受處罰。

example: In softball, the ball is pitched underhanded.
exampleZh: 在壘球比賽中，球是用低手投球的。

example: How do you adapt to different cultural norms and etiquette?
exampleZh: 您如何適應不同的文化規範和禮儀？

example: May happiness and joy come to you as you celebrate this joyous day.
exampleZh: 當您慶祝這個歡樂的日子時，願幸福和快樂降臨到您身上。

exampleZh: 加百列住在一條標準的住宅街道上。

example: I know a guy who has a foot fetish.
exampleZh: 我認識一個有戀足癖的人。

example: Is that a tortoise?
exampleZh: 那是一隻烏龜嗎？

exampleZh: 總統專車由重兵護衛。

definition: The absolute or relative size, extent or importance of something.
example: The earthquake was very severe, with a magnitude of 5.2.
exampleZh: 這次地震非常嚴重，震級為5.2級。

definition: A section of a ticket, showing the holder to be entitled to some specified accommodation or service, as to a passage over a designated line of travel, a particular seat in a theater, a discount, etc.

exampleZh: 馬克使用了折價券。

definition: The act of snoring, and the noise produced.

exampleZh: 我會開一些抗生素。

exampleZh: 如同朋友一樣的敵人

exampleZh: 公共關係公司通常充當公司和媒體之間的橋樑。

definition: A sexually promiscuous woman or girl.
example: The world needs sluts, too.
exampleZh: 這個世界也需要蕩婦。

exampleZh: 輔助部隊

definition: A quick grab, bat, or other motion with the hand or paw; a sweep.

exampleZh: 即使您不確定，也可以輕掃一下答案。

definition: To take a long position in.

exampleZh: 她渴望他回來。

exampleZh: 獨立的生計；使/賺取/獲得良好的生計

exampleZh: 他是一位出色的劍客。

exampleZh: 透過對空間的充分利用和新鮮的油漆，房間變成了一個令人愉快的圖書館，並設有舒適的休息區。

definition: The fact or action of giving birth to a child, as the culmination of pregnancy.

exampleZh: 許多婦女延後生育。

definition: Saturday, observed in Judaism and some Christian denominations as a day of rest and worship.

exampleZh: 安息日是猶太教和基督教的聖日。

exampleZh: 在短時間內找到保母總是很痛苦。

definition: To change (or to be changed) from a solid state to a liquid state, usually by a gradual heat.
example: The crane accidentally dropped the pot of molten metal.
exampleZh: 起重機不小心掉落了熔化的金屬罐。

definition: A device that charges or recharges

exampleZh: 將電池放在充電器中過夜，以便我們明天可以使用它們。

definition: Any fish of the order Siluriformes, mainly found in fresh water, lacking scales, and having barbels like whiskers around the mouth
example: Tom ordered the catfish.
exampleZh: 湯姆點了鯰魚。

definition: A problem affecting function.

exampleZh: 如果沒有放養計劃，人們幾乎不可能在溪流中找到鱒魚。

definition: The capacity of a weapon to deliver fire onto a target
example: France couldn't overwhelm Algerian independence fighters with its firepower.
exampleZh: 法國的火力無法壓倒阿爾及利亞獨立戰士。

definition: Certain members of the fish family Cyprinidae, including:
example: He noticed a roach on the wall.
exampleZh: 他注意到牆上有一隻蟑螂。

definition: A shaft in a multi-story building enclosing a stairway or staircase.

exampleZh: 他們把失蹤的孩子還給了他瘋狂的母親。

example: Give me the forks.
exampleZh: 把叉子給我。

definition: The large compound bone structure at the base of the spine that supports the legs. It consists of hip bone, sacrum and coccyx.
example: The doctor will examine the pelvis and rectum to feel for any blockages.
exampleZh: 醫生會檢查骨盆和直腸以感覺是否有任何阻塞。

definition: A black person; a person of sub-Saharan African descent.

exampleZh: 嚴格禁止黑人參觀那些為白人準備的醫院、圖書館、劇院、電影院、旅館和餐廳。
